message.content: vậy nếu sử dụng V1, V12 hay V12.1 hiệu quả có tốt hơn V4 thật không?

content.text: Câu hỏi rất đúng lúc — vì cú switch chính là nơi lý tưởng hóa nằm (và là nơi faithful V4 trả giá: phí flip thật + ngồi cash sau flip). Nếu bỏ switch đi (V1 = BAL+VN30 tĩnh, V2 = BAL+LAG tĩnh) thì trên nền thật có khi lại hơn. Tôi dựng 3 sổ B biến thể (VN30 luôn‑bật, LAG v12 8%, LAG v12.1 10%/8%) — mỗi cái một ledger thật 25B, spec đúng prodspec (VN30 không sector‑cap, LAG không stop/không parking) — rồi ghép với sổ A đã có.

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
pt_v4_variants_faithful.py — faithful V1 / V2(V12) / V2.1(V12.1) vs faithful V4.\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Same two-real-25B-ledger framework as pt_v4_full_faithful.py, but the SECOND book
is a STATIC (never-switching) variant — exactly the V1/V2 system shapes:
  V1   = BAL 25B + VN30 25B            (BA-v11 on top-30, [REDACTED] on, parking {3:0.7})
  V2   = BAL 25B + LAG-v12 25B         (earnings schedule, flat 8% sizing, no parking)
  V2.1 = BAL 25B + LAG-v12.1 25B       (S2 sizing 10%/8% by surprise, no parking)
  V4   = BAL 25B + SWITCHED 25B        (already run: pt_v4_full_faithful_nav_B.csv)
Spec fidelity: VN30 book = prodspec run_vn30 (no sector cap, hold 45/stop -20, ETF
parking); LAG books = prodspec run_lagged (25td time-exit only, no stop, no sector
cap, no parking, liq>=2B handled by 20%ADV cap + engine).
No flips -> no flip liquidation cost, no post-flip cash drag. The question: does
the ensemble switch EARN its real-world cost?
Run: python pt_v4_variants_faithful.py
"""
import sys, os, pickle
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
import simulate_holistic_nav as shn
from simulate_holistic_nav import simulate

W = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
BOOK = 25_000_000_000
TIER_BAL = ["MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY"]
TIER_WEIGHTS = {t: 0.10 for t in TIER_BAL}
BUY_TIERS = {"MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","MOMENTUM_QUALITY",
             "MOMENTUM_A","MOMENTUM_S_N","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY","COMPOUNDER_BUY","S_PRO"}

print("[1] Loading shared data...")
panel = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","v4f_panel_2014.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
sig_b = pickle.load(open(os.path.join(W,"ba_v11_unified_12y_sig.pkl"),"rb"))
sig_b["time"] = pd.to_datetime(sig_b["time"])
sig_b = sig_b[sig_b["time"] >= panel["time"].min()].copy()
dtg = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","daily_comovement_dt5g.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
state_by_date = {t: int(s) for t, s in zip(dtg["time"], dtg["state"])}
vni_dates = sorted(panel["time"].unique())
last_st = None
for d in vni_dates:
    if d in state_by_date: last_st = state_by_date[d]
    elif last_st is not None: state_by_date[d] = last_st
vnx = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"VNINDEX.csv"), usecols=["time","Close","MA200","D_RSI"], parse_dates=["time"])
vnx = vnx[vnx["time"] >= panel["time"].min()]
etf = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","e1vfvn30_daily.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vn30_und = pd.Series(etf["Close"].values, index=etf["time"])

def sv_tight_keep(row):
    s, days = row["state5"], row["days_since_release"]
    if pd.isna(s): return True
    s = int(s)
    if s in (4,5): return True
    if s == 1: return pd.notna(days) and days <= 30
    if s in (2,3): return pd.notna(days) and days <= 60
    return True
mb = sig_b["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS)
sig_b = sig_b[(~mb) | sig_b.apply(sv_tight_keep, axis=1)].copy()
v = vnx.merge(pd.DataFrame({"time": list(state_by_date.keys()), "st": list(state_by_date.values())}), on="time", how="left")
v["st"] = v["st"].ffill()
oh_dates = set(v[(v["Close"]/v["MA200"] > 1.30) & ((v["st"]==5) | (v["D_RSI"] > 0.75))]["time"])
sig_b.loc[sig_b["time"].isin(oh_dates) & sig_b["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS), "play_type"] = "AVOID_overheated"
sec_map = sig_b.dropna(subset=["sec"]).drop_duplicates("ticker").set_index("ticker")["sec"].to_dict()
prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"])) for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
opens  = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Open"]))  for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
liqlk  = {(r.ticker, r.time): r.liq_adv for r in panel.itertuples()}
sig_mom = sig_b[["time","ticker","play_type","ta","Close"]].copy()
date_pos = {d: i for i, d in enumerate(vni_dates)}

print("[2] LAGGED schedule...")
with open(os.path.join(W,"earnings_surprise_data.pkl"),"rb") as f: fin = pickle.load(f)
fin["Release_Date"] = pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]); FLOOR = 1e9
fin["exp_B_MA"] = fin[["NP_P1","NP_P2","NP_P3","NP_P4"]].mean(axis=1)
fin["surprise_B_MA"] = ((fin["NP_P0"] - fin["exp_B_MA"]) / np.maximum(np.abs(fin["exp_B_MA"]), FLOOR)).clip(-5, 5)
ev_class = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"earnings_events_classified.csv"), parse_dates=["Release_Date"])
ev = ev_class.merge(fin[["ticker","quarter","Release_Date","surprise_B_MA"]],
                    on=["ticker","quarter","Release_Date"], how="left")
ev = ev.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).reset_index(drop=True)
ev["surprise_B_MA"] = ev["surprise_B_MA"].fillna(0)
LN2 = np.log(2); HL = 3.0
ev["prior_n_good"] = 0; ev["pa_HL3"] = np.nan
for tk, g in ev.groupby("ticker"):
    hist = []
    for ri in g.index.tolist():
        row = ev.loc[ri]; cur = row["Release_Date"]
        ev.at[ri,"prior_n_good"] = len(hist)
        if hist:
            da = pd.to_datetime([d for d,_ in hist]); pa = np.array([p for _,p in hist])
            wts = np.exp(-LN2 * ((cur-da).days.values/365.25) / HL)
            ev.at[ri,"pa_HL3"] = (pa*wts).sum()/wts.sum() if wts.sum()>0 else np.nan
        if pd.notna(row["NP_R"]) and row["NP_R"] >= 15 and pd.notna(row["post_ret"]):
            hist.append((cur, row["post_ret"]))
e_hl3 = ev[(ev["NP_R"]>=15) & (ev["prior_n_good"]>=4) & (ev["pa_HL3"]>=5)].copy()
arr = np.array(vni_dates, dtype="datetime64[ns]")
def offset_date(ref, off):
    pos = np.searchsorted(arr, np.datetime64(ref), side="right") - 1
    tgt = pos + off
    return pd.Timestamp(arr[tgt]) if 0 <= tgt < len(arr) else None
lag_rows = []
for _, row in e_hl3.iterrows():
    tk = row["ticker"]
    entry = offset_date(row["Release_Date"], 5)
    if entry is None or tk not in prices: continue
    sigday = offset_date(entry, -1)
    if sigday is None or sigday not in prices[tk]: continue
    pt = "LAG_HI" if row["surprise_B_MA"] > 0.5 else "LAG_LO"
    lag_rows.append({"time": sigday, "ticker": tk, "play_type": pt, "ta": 400.0,
                     "Close": prices[tk][sigday]})
sig_lag = pd.DataFrame(lag_rows)
shn.TIER_PRIORITY.update({"LAG_HI": 88, "LAG_LO": 82})

top30 = set(pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","v4f_top30.csv"))["ticker"])
sig_v30 = sig_mom[sig_mom["ticker"].isin(top30)].copy()

LIQ = dict(liquidity_volume_pct=0.20, max_fill_days=5, liquidity_lookup=liqlk, exit_slippage_tiered=True)
BASE_KW = dict(max_positions=12, min_hold=2, slippage=0.001, init_nav=BOOK,
               ticker_sector_map=sec_map, deposit_annual=0.0, borrow_annual=0.10,
               state_by_date=state_by_date, open_prices=opens, t1_open_exec=True, **LIQ)

def run(sig, tiers, label, tw, **kw):
    nav, _ = simulate(sig, prices, vni_dates, allowed_tiers=tiers, tier_weights=tw,
                      name=label, **BASE_KW, **kw)
    nav["time"] = pd.to_datetime(nav["time"])
    return nav.set_index("time")["nav"]

def metrics(s):
    r = s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs = (s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr = (s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1
    dd = (s/s.cummax()-1).min(); sh = r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    return cagr*100, dd*100, sh, (cagr/abs(dd) if dd<0 else 0)

print("[3] Second-book variants (25B each)...")
nav_v30 = run(sig_v30, TIER_BAL, "VN30_[REDACTED]", TIER_WEIGHTS,
              hold_days=45, stop_loss=-0.20,
              cash_etf_states={3:0.7}, vn30_underlying=vn30_und,
              etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0, etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0, etf_rebalance_friction=0.0015)
print(f"    VN30 [REDACTED]-on : {nav_v30.iloc[-1]/1e9:.1f}B")
nav_l12 = run(sig_lag, ["LAG_HI","LAG_LO"], "LAG_v12", {"LAG_HI":0.08,"LAG_LO":0.08},
              hold_days=25, stop_loss=-0.99, stop_exempt_tiers={"LAG_HI","LAG_LO"},
              hold_days_by_tier={"LAG_HI":25,"LAG_LO":25},
              tier_position_limit={"LAG_HI":12,"LAG_LO":12})
print(f"    LAG v12 (8%)   : {nav_l12.iloc[-1]/1e9:.1f}B")
nav_l121 = run(sig_lag, ["LAG_HI","LAG_LO"], "LAG_v121", {"LAG_HI":0.10,"LAG_LO":0.08},
               hold_days=25, stop_loss=-0.99, stop_exempt_tiers={"LAG_HI","LAG_LO"},
               hold_days_by_tier={"LAG_HI":25,"LAG_LO":25},
               tier_position_limit={"LAG_HI":12,"LAG_LO":12})
print(f"    LAG v12.1 (S2) : {nav_l121.iloc[-1]/1e9:.1f}B")

navA = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","pt_v4_full_faithful_nav_A.csv"), parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")["nav"]
navB_sw = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","pt_v4_full_faithful_nav_B.csv"), parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")["nav"]

print("\n" + "="*94)
print("FAITHFUL SYSTEM COMPARISON (two real 25B ledgers each, 2014 -> now, real fills)")
print("="*94)
rows = [("V1  = BAL + VN30 (static)",        navA + nav_v30.reindex(navA.index).ffill()),
        ("V2  = BAL + LAG v12 (static)",     navA + nav_l12.reindex(navA.index).ffill()),
        ("V2.1= BAL + LAG v12.1 (static)",   navA + nav_l121.reindex(navA.index).ffill()),
        ("V4  = BAL + SWITCHED (ensemble)",  navA + navB_sw.reindex(navA.index).ffill())]
print(f"  {'system':<34}{'CAGR':>8}{'MaxDD':>9}{'Sharpe':>8}{'Calmar':>8}{'NAV':>9}")
for lbl, s in rows:
    c,d,sh,cal = metrics(s.dropna())
    print(f"  {lbl:<34}{c:>7.2f}%{d:>8.1f}%{sh:>8.2f}{cal:>8.2f}{s.dropna().iloc[-1]/1e9:>8.1f}B")
print("\n  standalone second books (25B):")
for lbl, s in [("BAL (book A)",navA),("VN30 [REDACTED]",nav_v30),("LAG v12",nav_l12),("LAG v12.1",nav_l121),("SWITCHED",navB_sw)]:
    c,d,sh,cal = metrics(s.dropna())
    print(f"    {lbl:<16}: CAGR {c:6.2f}%  MaxDD {d:6.1f}%  Sharpe {sh:.2f}")
# recombined references, same CSV
rc = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","5sys_prodspec_201401_202605_dt5g_rscap.csv"), parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")
def m2(s):
    s = s/s.iloc[0]; r = s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    return (s.iloc[-1]**(1/yrs)-1)*100, (s/s.cummax()-1).min()*100, r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
print("\n  recombined references:")
for col,lbl in [("V1_V11_TQ34b","V1"),("V2_V12_TQ34b","V2"),("V4_V121_ENS_TQ34b","V4"),("VNI","VNINDEX")]:
    cg,dd_,sh_ = m2(rc[col]); print(f"    {lbl:<8}: CAGR {cg:6.2f}%  MaxDD {dd_:6.1f}%  Sharpe {sh_:.2f}")
for name, s in [("v30_[REDACTED]",nav_v30),("lag_v12",nav_l12),("lag_v121",nav_l121)]:
    s.to_frame("nav").to_csv(os.path.join(W,f"data/pt_v4_variants_{name}.csv"))
print("  Saved: data/pt_v4_variants_*.csv")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
pt_v4_variants_faithful.py — faithful V1 / V2(V12) / V2.1(V12.1) vs faithful V4.\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Same two-real-25B-ledger framework as pt_v4_full_faithful.py, but the SECOND book
is a STATIC (never-switching) variant — exactly the V1/V2 system shapes:
  V1   = BAL 25B + VN30 25B            (BA-v11 on top-30, [REDACTED] on, parking {3:0.7})
  V2   = BAL 25B + LAG-v12 25B         (earnings schedule, flat 8% sizing, no parking)
  V2.1 = BAL 25B + LAG-v12.1 25B       (S2 sizing 10%/8% by surprise, no parking)
  V4   = BAL 25B + SWITCHED 25B        (already run: pt_v4_full_faithful_nav_B.csv)
Spec fidelity: VN30 book = prodspec run_vn30 (no sector cap, hold 45/stop -20, ETF
parking); LAG books = prodspec run_lagged (25td time-exit only, no stop, no sector
cap, no parking, liq>=2B handled by 20%ADV cap + engine).
No flips -> no flip liquidation cost, no post-flip cash drag. The question: does
the ensemble switch EARN its real-world cost?
Run: python pt_v4_variants_faithful.py
"""
import sys, os, pickle
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
import simulate_holistic_nav as shn
from simulate_holistic_nav import simulate

W = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
BOOK = 25_000_000_000
TIER_BAL = ["MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY"]
TIER_WEIGHTS = {t: 0.10 for t in TIER_BAL}
BUY_TIERS = {"MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","MOMENTUM_QUALITY",
             "MOMENTUM_A","MOMENTUM_S_N","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY","COMPOUNDER_BUY","S_PRO"}

print("[1] Loading shared data...")
panel = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","v4f_panel_2014.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
sig_b = pickle.load(open(os.path.join(W,"ba_v11_unified_12y_sig.pkl"),"rb"))
sig_b["time"] = pd.to_datetime(sig_b["time"])
sig_b = sig_b[sig_b["time"] >= panel["time"].min()].copy()
dtg = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","daily_comovement_dt5g.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
state_by_date = {t: int(s) for t, s in zip(dtg["time"], dtg["state"])}
vni_dates = sorted(panel["time"].unique())
last_st = None
for d in vni_dates:
    if d in state_by_date: last_st = state_by_date[d]
    elif last_st is not None: state_by_date[d] = last_st
vnx = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"VNINDEX.csv"), usecols=["time","Close","MA200","D_RSI"], parse_dates=["time"])
vnx = vnx[vnx["time"] >= panel["time"].min()]
etf = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","e1vfvn30_daily.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vn30_und = pd.Series(etf["Close"].values, index=etf["time"])

def sv_tight_keep(row):
    s, days = row["state5"], row["days_since_release"]
    if pd.isna(s): return True
    s = int(s)
    if s in (4,5): return True
    if s == 1: return pd.notna(days) and days <= 30
    if s in (2,3): return pd.notna(days) and days <= 60
    return True
mb = sig_b["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS)
sig_b = sig_b[(~mb) | sig_b.apply(sv_tight_keep, axis=1)].copy()
v = vnx.merge(pd.DataFrame({"time": list(state_by_date.keys()), "st": list(state_by_date.values())}), on="time", how="left")
v["st"] = v["st"].ffill()
oh_dates = set(v[(v["Close"]/v["MA200"] > 1.30) & ((v["st"]==5) | (v["D_RSI"] > 0.75))]["time"])
sig_b.loc[sig_b["time"].isin(oh_dates) & sig_b["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS), "play_type"] = "AVOID_overheated"
sec_map = sig_b.dropna(subset=["sec"]).drop_duplicates("ticker").set_index("ticker")["sec"].to_dict()
prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"])) for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
opens  = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Open"]))  for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
liqlk  = {(r.ticker, r.time): r.liq_adv for r in panel.itertuples()}
sig_mom = sig_b[["time","ticker","play_type","ta","Close"]].copy()
date_pos = {d: i for i, d in enumerate(vni_dates)}

print("[2] LAGGED schedule...")
with open(os.path.join(W,"earnings_surprise_data.pkl"),"rb") as f: fin = pickle.load(f)
fin["Release_Date"] = pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]); FLOOR = 1e9
fin["exp_B_MA"] = fin[["NP_P1","NP_P2","NP_P3","NP_P4"]].mean(axis=1)
fin["surprise_B_MA"] = ((fin["NP_P0"] - fin["exp_B_MA"]) / np.maximum(np.abs(fin["exp_B_MA"]), FLOOR)).clip(-5, 5)
ev_class = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"earnings_events_classified.csv"), parse_dates=["Release_Date"])
ev = ev_class.merge(fin[["ticker","quarter","Release_Date","surprise_B_MA"]],
                    on=["ticker","quarter","Release_Date"], how="left")
ev = ev.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).reset_index(drop=True)
ev["surprise_B_MA"] = ev["surprise_B_MA"].fillna(0)
LN2 = np.log(2); HL = 3.0
ev["prior_n_good"] = 0; ev["pa_HL3"] = np.nan
for tk, g in ev.groupby("ticker"):
    hist = []
    for ri in g.index.tolist():
        row = ev.loc[ri]; cur = row["Release_Date"]
        ev.at[ri,"prior_n_good"] = len(hist)
        if hist:
            da = pd.to_datetime([d for d,_ in hist]); pa = np.array([p for _,p in hist])
            wts = np.exp(-LN2 * ((cur-da).days.values/365.25) / HL)
            ev.at[ri,"pa_HL3"] = (pa*wts).sum()/wts.sum() if wts.sum()>0 else np.nan
        if pd.notna(row["NP_R"]) and row["NP_R"] >= 15 and pd.notna(row["post_ret"]):
            hist.append((cur, row["post_ret"]))
e_hl3 = ev[(ev["NP_R"]>=15) & (ev["prior_n_good"]>=4) & (ev["pa_HL3"]>=5)].copy()
arr = np.array(vni_dates, dtype="datetime64[ns]")
def offset_date(ref, off):
    pos = np.searchsorted(arr, np.datetime64(ref), side="right") - 1
    tgt = pos + off
    return pd.Timestamp(arr[tgt]) if 0 <= tgt < len(arr) else None
lag_rows = []
for _, row in e_hl3.iterrows():
    tk = row["ticker"]
    entry = offset_date(row["Release_Date"], 5)
    if entry is None or tk not in prices: continue
    sigday = offset_date(entry, -1)
    if sigday is None or sigday not in prices[tk]: continue
    pt = "LAG_HI" if row["surprise_B_MA"] > 0.5 else "LAG_LO"
    lag_rows.append({"time": sigday, "ticker": tk, "play_type": pt, "ta": 400.0,
                     "Close": prices[tk][sigday]})
sig_lag = pd.DataFrame(lag_rows)
shn.TIER_PRIORITY.update({"LAG_HI": 88, "LAG_LO": 82})

top30 = set(pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","v4f_top30.csv"))["ticker"])
sig_v30 = sig_mom[sig_mom["ticker"].isin(top30)].copy()

LIQ = dict(liquidity_volume_pct=0.20, max_fill_days=5, liquidity_lookup=liqlk, exit_slippage_tiered=True)
BASE_KW = dict(max_positions=12, min_hold=2, slippage=0.001, init_nav=BOOK,
               ticker_sector_map=sec_map, deposit_annual=0.0, borrow_annual=0.10,
               state_by_date=state_by_date, open_prices=opens, t1_open_exec=True, **LIQ)

def run(sig, tiers, label, tw, **kw):
    nav, _ = simulate(sig, prices, vni_dates, allowed_tiers=tiers, tier_weights=tw,
                      name=label, **BASE_KW, **kw)
    nav["time"] = pd.to_datetime(nav["time"])
    return nav.set_index("time")["nav"]

def metrics(s):
    r = s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs = (s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr = (s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1
    dd = (s/s.cummax()-1).min(); sh = r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    return cagr*100, dd*100, sh, (cagr/abs(dd) if dd<0 else 0)

print("[3] Second-book variants (25B each)...")
nav_v30 = run(sig_v30, TIER_BAL, "VN30_[REDACTED]", TIER_WEIGHTS,
              hold_days=45, stop_loss=-0.20,
              cash_etf_states={3:0.7}, vn30_underlying=vn30_und,
              etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0, etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0, etf_rebalance_friction=0.0015)
print(f"    VN30 [REDACTED]-on : {nav_v30.iloc[-1]/1e9:.1f}B")
nav_l12 = run(sig_lag, ["LAG_HI","LAG_LO"], "LAG_v12", {"LAG_HI":0.08,"LAG_LO":0.08},
              hold_days=25, stop_loss=-0.99, stop_exempt_tiers={"LAG_HI","LAG_LO"},
              hold_days_by_tier={"LAG_HI":25,"LAG_LO":25},
              tier_position_limit={"LAG_HI":12,"LAG_LO":12})
print(f"    LAG v12 (8%)   : {nav_l12.iloc[-1]/1e9:.1f}B")
nav_l121 = run(sig_lag, ["LAG_HI","LAG_LO"], "LAG_v121", {"LAG_HI":0.10,"LAG_LO":0.08},
               hold_days=25, stop_loss=-0.99, stop_exempt_tiers={"LAG_HI","LAG_LO"},
               hold_days_by_tier={"LAG_HI":25,"LAG_LO":25},
               tier_position_limit={"LAG_HI":12,"LAG_LO":12})
print(f"    LAG v12.1 (S2) : {nav_l121.iloc[-1]/1e9:.1f}B")

navA = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","pt_v4_full_faithful_nav_A.csv"), parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")["nav"]
navB_sw = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","pt_v4_full_faithful_nav_B.csv"), parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")["nav"]

print("\n" + "="*94)
print("FAITHFUL SYSTEM COMPARISON (two real 25B ledgers each, 2014 -> now, real fills)")
print("="*94)
rows = [("V1  = BAL + VN30 (static)",        navA + nav_v30.reindex(navA.index).ffill()),
        ("V2  = BAL + LAG v12 (static)",     navA + nav_l12.reindex(navA.index).ffill()),
        ("V2.1= BAL + LAG v12.1 (static)",   navA + nav_l121.reindex(navA.index).ffill()),
        ("V4  = BAL + SWITCHED (ensemble)",  navA + navB_sw.reindex(navA.index).ffill())]
print(f"  {'system':<34}{'CAGR':>8}{'MaxDD':>9}{'Sharpe':>8}{'Calmar':>8}{'NAV':>9}")
for lbl, s in rows:
    c,d,sh,cal = metrics(s.dropna())
    print(f"  {lbl:<34}{c:>7.2f}%{d:>8.1f}%{sh:>8.2f}{cal:>8.2f}{s.dropna().iloc[-1]/1e9:>8.1f}B")
print("\n  standalone second books (25B):")
for lbl, s in [("BAL (book A)",navA),("VN30 [REDACTED]",nav_v30),("LAG v12",nav_l12),("LAG v12.1",nav_l121),("SWITCHED",navB_sw)]:
    c,d,sh,cal = metrics(s.dropna())
    print(f"    {lbl:<16}: CAGR {c:6.2f}%  MaxDD {d:6.1f}%  Sharpe {sh:.2f}")
# recombined references, same CSV
rc = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","5sys_prodspec_201401_202605_dt5g_rscap.csv"), parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")
def m2(s):
    s = s/s.iloc[0]; r = s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    return (s.iloc[-1]**(1/yrs)-1)*100, (s/s.cummax()-1).min()*100, r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
print("\n  recombined references:")
for col,lbl in [("V1_V11_TQ34b","V1"),("V2_V12_TQ34b","V2"),("V4_V121_ENS_TQ34b","V4"),("VNI","VNINDEX")]:
    cg,dd_,sh_ = m2(rc[col]); print(f"    {lbl:<8}: CAGR {cg:6.2f}%  MaxDD {dd_:6.1f}%  Sharpe {sh_:.2f}")
for name, s in [("v30_[REDACTED]",nav_v30),("lag_v12",nav_l12),("lag_v121",nav_l121)]:
    s.to_frame("nav").to_csv(os.path.join(W,f"data/pt_v4_variants_{name}.csv"))
print("  Saved: data/pt_v4_variants_*.csv")

input.new_string:
**VARIANTS SHOWDOWN (`pt_v4_variants_faithful.py`, same framework, same Book A): FAITHFUL RANKING REVERSES — V2/V2.1 STATIC BEAT V4.**
| faithful system | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| V1 = BAL+VN30 static | 14.62% | −24.5 | 1.15 | 0.60 |
| V2 = BAL+LAGv12 static | 20.63% | **−19.9** | 1.57 | **1.04** |
| **V2.1 = BAL+LAGv12.1 static** | **21.23%** | −20.6 | **1.58** | 1.03 |
| V4 = BAL+SWITCHED | 14.20% | −22.2 | 1.10 | 0.64 |

Recombined ranking was V4(23.1) > V2(22.2) > V1(20.1) — faithful ranking is V2.1 > V2 >> V1 ≈ V4. Standalone books: LAG v12.1 alone **25.33%/Sh1.46** (LAG leg was ALWAYS an honest single-wallet sim in prodspec → reproduces nearly fully; V2 gap recombined→faithful only −1.6pp = BAL-side idealization). SWITCHED standalone 13.98%/Sh0.87 — **the ensemble switch DESTROYS ~10.5pp vs simply holding LAG**, because in real execution every flip to V11-mode liquidates LAG and then the top-30-restricted BA-v11 signal is SPARSE (93 buys/12y) → dead capital in ETF/cash; the recombined switch teleports into a continuously-compounding VN30 book instead. Same lesson as [[dt4_ensemble_smart_integration]] (re-validate on prod/faithful, never reduced harness) — extended: **the V121_ENS switch never survived a real ledger; V4's entire edge over V2 was recombination artifact**. Faithful-switch is a lower bound (waits for new signals post-flip), but it would need +7pp to catch V2.1 — implausible. **Honest champion = V2.1 (BAL + LAG v12.1, static, no switching): 21.23%/Sh1.58/DD−20.6** (+capit sleeve stacks on top). Caveat: LAG capacity at 25B fine, degrades at bigger NAV like everything else.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
---
name: v4-faithful-reproduction-2026
description: V4 (V121_ENS) reproduced as two real 25B ledgers with real flip liquidation — honest full-period CAGR ~14.2% (not 23.1%); capit sleeve +3.6pp on this host; switched-leg idealization quantified
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: ec3e71a4-ebe6-4058-81a6-bd076209b245
---

**V4 FULL-FAITHFUL reproduction ([REDACTED]10, `pt_v4_full_faithful.py [--capit]`)** — user asked to reproduce V4's REAL number as faithfully as possible. Finding that triggered it: even the LIVE `pt_v4_dt5g.py` builds the SWITCHED leg idealized (lines ~522-542: return-switching between two independently-running sims, flat 0.5%/flip, SWITCH events "virtual", inactive book keeps compounding and flips inherit its NAV) — **V4's switched leg had never been a real wallet anywhere**.

Faithful build = two REAL 25B ledgers (real partition, like two accounts):
- **Book A (BAL 25B)**: real BA-v11 pkl signal + SV_TIGHT + overheat-AVOID, TIER_BAL tw10%, max12, hold45, stop−20%, DT5G parking {3:0.7} E1VFVN30, real fills (T+1 Open, slip, 20%ADV cap, 0.3%TC).
- **Book B (SWITCHED 25B, ONE ledger)**: sig_AH==1 → BA-v11 restricted top-30; ==0 → LAGGED earnings-surprise schedule (rebuilt exactly: NP_R≥15 & prior_n_good≥4 & pa_HL3≥5, T+5 entry, 25td hold, 10%/8% S2 sizing, no stop). **On each of 28 flips the outgoing mode's positions are SOLD FOR REAL at T+1 Open** (64 MODE_FLIP sells, 515B turnover) and the incoming mode rebuys from actual cash. Engine gained additive param `force_close_tiers_dates`.
- sig_AH reused from rscap CSV (point-in-time M1+M3r AND-HOLD, NAV-independent).

**RESULT (full 2014→2026-06, 50B):**
| | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe |
|---|---|---|---|
| V4 FAITHFUL (A+B) | **14.20%** | −22.2% | 1.10 |
| V4 FAITHFUL + CAPIT | **17.83% (+3.62pp)** | −23.1% | 1.20 |
| V4 recombined (ref) | 23.06% | −24.1% | 1.56 |
| VNINDEX B&H | 11.42% | −45.3% | 0.69 |

Reads:
1. **Honest V4 ≈ 14.2%/Sh1.10, NOT 23.1%/1.56** — idealization gap ≈ 8.9pp full-period (consistent with [[v5_prodspec_integrity_audit]] ~12pp finding). Still beats VNI with HALF the DD → the system's real value is risk-adjusted.
2. **Faithful is a LOWER bound on the switched leg**: as-built, after a flip the book waits for NEW signals (sparse V30 tier → sits in cash/ETF), whereas a real trader could replicate the incoming book's CURRENT target portfolio at flip. Recombined = costless instant teleport (upper). Truth in between; not yet quantified.
3. **CAPIT committed sleeve on this two-book host: +3.62pp** (14.20→17.83, Sh 1.10→1.20, DD ≈) — stronger than the single-book +2.66pp (two ledgers hold more total idle cash at washouts). Deployable capit range: **+2.5–3.6pp**, decaying with NAV (capacity, see [[capitulation-overlay-accounting-fix-2026]]).
4. Capacity again: BAL faithful at 25B = 14.42% vs at 50B = 12.85% (smaller book fills better).
5. Book B composition: LAG trades dominate (871 buys vs 93 V30 momentum buys) — in V11 mode the top-30-restricted BA-v11 signal is SPARSE, the faithful book parks ETF/cash; the recombined VN30 leg's continuous full investment is a big chunk of the gap.

content.text:
**Có — và đảo ngược hoàn toàn thứ hạng.** Trên nền thật (cùng sổ A, cùng engine, cùng fill, chỉ khác sổ B), các hệ TĨNH thắng V4 áp đảo:

## Bảng so sánh faithful (2 ledger 25B thật, 2014→nay)

| Hệ (faithful) | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| V1 = BAL + VN30 tĩnh | 14.62% | −24.5% | 1.15 | 0.60 |
| V2 = BAL + LAG v12 tĩnh | 20.63% | **−19.9%** | 1.57 | **1.04** |
| **V2.1 = BAL + LAG v12.1 tĩnh** | **21.23%** | −20.6% | **1.58** | 1.03 |
| V4 = BAL + SWITCHED (ensemble) | 14.20% | −22.2% | 1.10 | 0.64 |

So với recombined (V4 23.1 > V2 22.2 > V1 20.1), **thứ hạng thật là V2.1 > V2 ≫ V1 ≈ V4**.

## Vì sao đảo ngược — ba dữ kiện từ sổ đứng riêng

1. **LAG v12.1 đứng một mình = 25.33%/Sharpe 1.46** — và đây là con số đáng tin nhất trong toàn bộ hệ sinh thái: chân LAG trong prodspec **vốn đã là sim một‑ví thật** (`run_lagged` có ledger cash riêng, fill cap thật), nên nó tái tạo gần như nguyên vẹn. Bằng chứng: V2 recombined 22.24% vs faithful 20.63% — gap chỉ −1.6pp (toàn bộ từ phía BAL).

2. **SWITCHED đứng một mình = 13.98%/Sharpe 0.87 — cú switch PHÁ ~10.5pp** so với chỉ cầm LAG tĩnh. Cơ chế: mỗi cú flip sang mode V11 nghĩa là thanh lý sạch sổ LAG đang sinh lời, rồi… tín hiệu BA‑v11 giới hạn top‑30 quá thưa (93 lệnh mua/12 năm!) → vốn nằm chết trong ETF/cash suốt mode V11 (58% số ngày). Trên nền recombined, cú switch "teleport" vào một sổ VN30 đang compound liên tục — chính cái teleport đó là toàn bộ edge của V4 over V2, và nó **không tồn tại ngoài đời**.

3. V1 cũng không cứu được: VN30 luôn‑bật chỉ 14.81%, ngang BAL — tín hiệu momentum trên rổ top‑30 quá thưa để gánh 25B.

## Kết luận

- **Quán quân thật = V2.1 (BAL + LAG v12.1, tĩnh, không switch): 21.23%, Sharpe 1.58, MaxDD −20.6%** — hơn V4 thật +7pp, DD nông hơn, và sleeve capitulation (+2.5–3.6pp) vẫn xếp chồng lên được vì sổ LAG cầm cash khi vắng sự kiện.
- Đây là lần thứ hai bài học này xuất hiện (lần trước: DT4‑ensemble fail trên prod‑spec): **mọi cơ chế switch/ensemble phải được kiểm trên ledger thật trước khi tin** — V121_ENS chưa từng qua bài kiểm đó, và edge của nó là artifact của phép ghép.
- Công bằng mà nói: faithful‑switch của tôi là cận dưới (sau flip chờ tín hiệu mới thay vì replicate danh mục đích), nhưng nó cần bù +7pp mới đuổi kịp V2.1 — không khả thi.

Đã lưu memory đầy đủ. Nếu bạn muốn đi tiếp, bước tự nhiên nhất là **paper‑trade V2.1 song song V4** (dựng `pt_v21_dt5g.py` từ khung pt_v4_dt5g, bỏ switch, thêm chân LAG) để có bằng chứng forward trước khi xoay vốn thật sang cấu trúc tĩnh.

content: LAG v12.1 đứng một mình = 25.33%/Sharpe 1.46, không phải đây là con số cao nhất không cần kết hợp với BAL à ?

content.text: Đúng là CAGR cao nhất — nhưng trước khi kết luận "bỏ BAL, all‑in LAG", phải kiểm tra một điều: con số 25.33% đó là của sổ LAG **25B**. Nếu dồn cả 50B vào LAG, mỗi vị thế to gấp đôi và trần thanh khoản sẽ cắn (đúng bài học capacity của capit sleeve). Tôi chạy thử LAG v12.1 standalone ở 50B để đo trực tiếp:

cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && python - <<'EOF' 2>&1 | tail -15
import sys, os, pickle
sys.argv=['x']
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
import simulate_holistic_nav as shn
from simulate_holistic_nav import simulate
W = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
panel = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","v4f_panel_2014.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vni_dates = sorted(panel["time"].unique())
prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"])) for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
opens  = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Open"]))  for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
liqlk  = {(r.ticker, r.time): r.liq_adv for r in panel.itertuples()}
dtg = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","daily_comovement_dt5g.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
state_by_date = {t: int(s) for t, s in zip(dtg["time"], dtg["state"])}

with open(os.path.join(W,"earnings_surprise_data.pkl"),"rb") as f: fin = pickle.load(f)
fin["Release_Date"] = pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]); FLOOR=1e9
fin["exp_B_MA"] = fin[["NP_P1","NP_P2","NP_P3","NP_P4"]].mean(axis=1)
fin["surprise_B_MA"] = ((fin["NP_P0"]-fin["exp_B_MA"])/np.maximum(np.abs(fin["exp_B_MA"]),FLOOR)).clip(-5,5)
ev_class = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"earnings_events_classified.csv"), parse_dates=["Release_Date"])
ev = ev_class.merge(fin[["ticker","quarter","Release_Date","surprise_B_MA"]],on=["ticker","quarter","Release_Date"],how="left")
ev = ev.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).reset_index(drop=True); ev["surprise_B_MA"]=ev["surprise_B_MA"].fillna(0)
LN2=np.log(2); HL=3.0; ev["prior_n_good"]=0; ev["pa_HL3"]=np.nan
for tk,g in ev.groupby("ticker"):
    hist=[]
    for ri in g.index.tolist():
        row=ev.loc[ri]; cur=row["Release_Date"]; ev.at[ri,"prior_n_good"]=len(hist)
        if hist:
            da=pd.to_datetime([d for d,_ in hist]); pa=np.array([p for _,p in hist])
            wts=np.exp(-LN2*((cur-da).days.values/365.25)/HL)
            ev.at[ri,"pa_HL3"]=(pa*wts).sum()/wts.sum() if wts.sum()>0 else np.nan
        if pd.notna(row["NP_R"]) and row["NP_R"]>=15 and pd.notna(row["post_ret"]): hist.append((cur,row["post_ret"]))
e_hl3 = ev[(ev["NP_R"]>=15)&(ev["prior_n_good"]>=4)&(ev["pa_HL3"]>=5)].copy()
arr=np.array(vni_dates,dtype="datetime64[ns]")
def offd(ref,off):
    pos=np.searchsorted(arr,np.datetime64(ref),side="right")-1; t=pos+off
    return pd.Timestamp(arr[t]) if 0<=t<len(arr) else None
rows=[]
for _,row in e_hl3.iterrows():
    tk=row["ticker"]; entry=offd(row["Release_Date"],5)
    if entry is None or tk not in prices: continue
    sd=offd(entry,-1)
    if sd is None or sd not in prices[tk]: continue
    rows.append({"time":sd,"ticker":tk,"play_type":"LAG_HI" if row["surprise_B_MA"]>0.5 else "LAG_LO","ta":400.0,"Close":prices[tk][sd]})
sig_lag=pd.DataFrame(rows)
shn.TIER_PRIORITY.update({"LAG_HI":88,"LAG_LO":82})
def runlag(init):
    nav,_=simulate(sig_lag,prices,vni_dates,allowed_tiers=["LAG_HI","LAG_LO"],max_positions=12,
        tier_weights={"LAG_HI":0.10,"LAG_LO":0.08},hold_days=25,stop_loss=-0.99,min_hold=2,
        stop_exempt_tiers={"LAG_HI","LAG_LO"},hold_days_by_tier={"LAG_HI":25,"LAG_LO":25},
        tier_position_limit={"LAG_HI":12,"LAG_LO":12},slippage=0.001,init_nav=init,
        deposit_annual=0.0,borrow_annual=0.10,state_by_date=state_by_date,
        liquidity_volume_pct=0.20,max_fill_days=5,liquidity_lookup=liqlk,exit_slippage_tiered=True,
        open_prices=opens,t1_open_exec=True,name=f"LAG_{init/1e9:.0f}B")
    nav["time"]=pd.to_datetime(nav["time"]); s=nav.set_index("time")["nav"]
    r=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1; dd=(s/s.cummax()-1).min(); sh=r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    dep=nav.set_index("time")["deployed_pct"]
    return cagr*100,dd*100,sh,s.iloc[-1]/1e9,dep.mean()
for init in [25e9,50e9,100e9]:
    c,d,sh,w,dp=runlag(init)
    print(f"LAG v12.1 standalone @ {init/1e9:>3.0f}B : CAGR {c:6.2f}%  MaxDD {d:6.1f}%  Sharpe {sh:.2f}  NAV {w:7.1f}B  avg-deployed {dp:.0f}%")
EOF

toolUseResult.originalFile:
---
name: v4-faithful-reproduction-2026
description: V4 (V121_ENS) reproduced as two real 25B ledgers with real flip liquidation — honest full-period CAGR ~14.2% (not 23.1%); capit sleeve +3.6pp on this host; switched-leg idealization quantified
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: ec3e71a4-ebe6-4058-81a6-bd076209b245
---

**V4 FULL-FAITHFUL reproduction ([REDACTED]10, `pt_v4_full_faithful.py [--capit]`)** — user asked to reproduce V4's REAL number as faithfully as possible. Finding that triggered it: even the LIVE `pt_v4_dt5g.py` builds the SWITCHED leg idealized (lines ~522-542: return-switching between two independently-running sims, flat 0.5%/flip, SWITCH events "virtual", inactive book keeps compounding and flips inherit its NAV) — **V4's switched leg had never been a real wallet anywhere**.

Faithful build = two REAL 25B ledgers (real partition, like two accounts):
- **Book A (BAL 25B)**: real BA-v11 pkl signal + SV_TIGHT + overheat-AVOID, TIER_BAL tw10%, max12, hold45, stop−20%, DT5G parking {3:0.7} E1VFVN30, real fills (T+1 Open, slip, 20%ADV cap, 0.3%TC).
- **Book B (SWITCHED 25B, ONE ledger)**: sig_AH==1 → BA-v11 restricted top-30; ==0 → LAGGED earnings-surprise schedule (rebuilt exactly: NP_R≥15 & prior_n_good≥4 & pa_HL3≥5, T+5 entry, 25td hold, 10%/8% S2 sizing, no stop). **On each of 28 flips the outgoing mode's positions are SOLD FOR REAL at T+1 Open** (64 MODE_FLIP sells, 515B turnover) and the incoming mode rebuys from actual cash. Engine gained additive param `force_close_tiers_dates`.
- sig_AH reused from rscap CSV (point-in-time M1+M3r AND-HOLD, NAV-independent).

**RESULT (full 2014→2026-06, 50B):**
| | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe |
|---|---|---|---|
| V4 FAITHFUL (A+B) | **14.20%** | −22.2% | 1.10 |
| V4 FAITHFUL + CAPIT | **17.83% (+3.62pp)** | −23.1% | 1.20 |
| V4 recombined (ref) | 23.06% | −24.1% | 1.56 |
| VNINDEX B&H | 11.42% | −45.3% | 0.69 |

Reads:
1. **Honest V4 ≈ 14.2%/Sh1.10, NOT 23.1%/1.56** — idealization gap ≈ 8.9pp full-period (consistent with [[v5_prodspec_integrity_audit]] ~12pp finding). Still beats VNI with HALF the DD → the system's real value is risk-adjusted.
2. **Faithful is a LOWER bound on the switched leg**: as-built, after a flip the book waits for NEW signals (sparse V30 tier → sits in cash/ETF), whereas a real trader could replicate the incoming book's CURRENT target portfolio at flip. Recombined = costless instant teleport (upper). Truth in between; not yet quantified.
3. **CAPIT committed sleeve on this two-book host: +3.62pp** (14.20→17.83, Sh 1.10→1.20, DD ≈) — stronger than the single-book +2.66pp (two ledgers hold more total idle cash at washouts). Deployable capit range: **+2.5–3.6pp**, decaying with NAV (capacity, see [[capitulation-overlay-accounting-fix-2026]]).
4. Capacity again: BAL faithful at 25B = 14.42% vs at 50B = 12.85% (smaller book fills better).
5. Book B composition: LAG trades dominate (871 buys vs 93 V30 momentum buys) — in V11 mode the top-30-restricted BA-v11 signal is SPARSE, the faithful book parks ETF/cash; the recombined VN30 leg's continuous full investment is a big chunk of the gap.

**VARIANTS SHOWDOWN (`pt_v4_variants_faithful.py`, same framework, same Book A): FAITHFUL RANKING REVERSES — V2/V2.1 STATIC BEAT V4.**
| faithful system | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| V1 = BAL+VN30 static | 14.62% | −24.5 | 1.15 | 0.60 |
| V2 = BAL+LAGv12 static | 20.63% | **−19.9** | 1.57 | **1.04** |
| **V2.1 = BAL+LAGv12.1 static** | **21.23%** | −20.6 | **1.58** | 1.03 |
| V4 = BAL+SWITCHED | 14.20% | −22.2 | 1.10 | 0.64 |

Recombined ranking was V4(23.1) > V2(22.2) > V1(20.1) — faithful ranking is V2.1 > V2 >> V1 ≈ V4. Standalone books: LAG v12.1 alone **25.33%/Sh1.46** (LAG leg was ALWAYS an honest single-wallet sim in prodspec → reproduces nearly fully; V2 gap recombined→faithful only −1.6pp = BAL-side idealization). SWITCHED standalone 13.98%/Sh0.87 — **the ensemble switch DESTROYS ~10.5pp vs simply holding LAG**, because in real execution every flip to V11-mode liquidates LAG and then the top-30-restricted BA-v11 signal is SPARSE (93 buys/12y) → dead capital in ETF/cash; the recombined switch teleports into a continuously-compounding VN30 book instead. Same lesson as [[dt4_ensemble_smart_integration]] (re-validate on prod/faithful, never reduced harness) — extended: **the V121_ENS switch never survived a real ledger; V4's entire edge over V2 was recombination artifact**. Faithful-switch is a lower bound (waits for new signals post-flip), but it would need +7pp to catch V2.1 — implausible. **Honest champion = V2.1 (BAL + LAG v12.1, static, no switching): 21.23%/Sh1.58/DD−20.6** (+capit sleeve stacks on top). Caveat: LAG capacity at 25B fine, degrades at bigger NAV like everything else.

lastPrompt: LAG v12.1 đứng một mình = 25.33%/Sharpe 1.46, không phải đây là con số cao nhất không cần kết hợp với BAL à ?

aiTitle: Review V5 backtest results and data availability

content.text:
**Không — 25.33% là con số của LAG ở 25B, và nó không sống sót khi dồn cả 50B vào.** Tôi vừa chạy capacity test trực tiếp:

| LAG v12.1 all‑in | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe | avg-deployed |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| @ 25B (số bạn hỏi) | 25.33% | −29.4% | 1.46 | 40% |
| **@ 50B (all‑in thật)** | **22.00%** | **−28.5%** | **1.35** | 38% |
| @ 100B | 20.40% | −24.2% | 1.31 | 35% |

So sánh công bằng — cùng 50B tổng:

| | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| All‑in LAG 50B | 22.00% | −28.5% | 1.35 | 0.77 |
| **V2.1 = BAL 25B + LAG 25B** | 21.23% | **−20.6%** | **1.58** | **1.03** |

All‑in chỉ hơn **+0.77pp CAGR** nhưng trả giá bằng **DD sâu hơn 8 điểm** (−28.5 vs −20.6) và Sharpe/Calmar tệ hơn rõ rệt. Ba lý do đứng sau:

1. **Capacity ăn ngay phần lợi**: nhân đôi sổ → mỗi vị thế 10% NAV to gấp đôi trên cùng các mã mid‑cap quanh mùa BCTC → trần 20% ADV cắt fill, 25.33% tụt còn 22.00% ngay ở bước 25→50B. Đường cong còn dốc xuống tiếp khi NAV compound (sổ này kết thúc ở ~590B).

2. **LAG chỉ làm việc ~40% thời gian** (event‑driven theo mùa báo cáo, 60% thời gian ngồi cash). Ghép BAL nghĩa là nửa kia của vốn **làm việc khi LAG nghỉ** — đó là lý do combo có Sharpe 1.58 > cả hai sổ thành phần. Diversification ở đây gần như miễn phí, không phải đánh đổi.

3. **Fragility một‑chiến‑lược**: LAG là đúng một họ tín hiệu (earnings‑surprise của các mã có track record), 871 lệnh/12 năm. Nếu edge này decay (mọi edge đều có thể — xem Edge Health Monitor: momentum vừa FLIP 2025‑26), all‑in nghĩa là cả book chết cùng nó. Đây lại đúng logic Kelly‑dưới‑bất‑định ta vừa ghi vào playbook: **không all‑in chiến lược có mean cao nhất khi tham số ước lượng từ mẫu hữu hạn** — co về fractional + đa dạng hóa.

Kết luận: **giữ V2.1 (BAL + LAG, tĩnh)** — nhường 0.77pp CAGR để mua 8pp DD nông hơn và một book hai chân không chết chùm. Nếu muốn "ép" thêm return từ cấu trúc này, chỗ đúng không phải all‑in LAG mà là: (a) sleeve capitulation (+2.5–3.6pp, dùng đúng phần cash LAG đang để không), và (b) park ETF phần idle của sổ LAG trong state tốt (hiện sổ LAG để cash trần 0% — một cải tiến thực thi, không phải đổi chiến lược). Đã lưu toàn bộ vào memory.

content: khi chúng ta sử dụng LAG chúng ta đã tính đến việc sử dụng hệ thống 8L mới nhất chưa? hay chúng ta dựa trên cơ chế nào để chọn cho book LAG

message.content: khi chúng ta sử dụng LAG chúng ta đã tính đến việc sử dụng hệ thống 8L mới nhất chưa? hay chúng ta dựa trên cơ chế nào để chọn cho book LAG

content.text:
Câu hỏi chạm đúng chỗ. Trả lời ngắn: **chưa** — book LAG không hề biết 8L tồn tại. Để tôi mô tả chính xác cơ chế nó đang dùng (từ code tôi vừa tái tạo), rồi kiểm tra bằng số xem 8L có thêm giá trị không.

**Cơ chế chọn mã hiện tại của LAG (thuần earnings, không FA/8L):**
1. `NP_R ≥ 15` — quý vừa báo lãi tăng ≥15% YoY
2. `prior_n_good ≥ 4` — đã có ≥4 quý tốt tương tự trong quá khứ (track record)
3. `pa_HL3 ≥ 5` — trung bình suy giảm (half‑life 3 năm) của *phản ứng giá sau các tin tốt cũ* ≥ +5% — tức cổ phiếu có "thói quen tăng sau tin tốt"
4. Vào T+5 sau ngày công bố, giữ đúng 25 phiên, size 10% nếu surprise lớn (>0.5) / 8% nếu không

Không có cổng chất lượng, không định giá, không 8L. Giờ kiểm tra thực nghiệm: bucket 871 entry LAG theo rating 8L tại thời điểm vào lệnh.

input.command:
cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && python - <<'EOF' 2>&1 | tail -30
import numpy as np, pandas as pd, pickle, os
W = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
panel = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","v4f_panel_2014.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vni_dates = sorted(panel["time"].unique())
opens = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Open"])) for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}

with open(os.path.join(W,"earnings_surprise_data.pkl"),"rb") as f: fin = pickle.load(f)
fin["Release_Date"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]); FLOOR=1e9
fin["exp_B_MA"]=fin[["NP_P1","NP_P2","NP_P3","NP_P4"]].mean(axis=1)
fin["surprise_B_MA"]=((fin["NP_P0"]-fin["exp_B_MA"])/np.maximum(np.abs(fin["exp_B_MA"]),FLOOR)).clip(-5,5)
ev_class=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"earnings_events_classified.csv"),parse_dates=["Release_Date"])
ev=ev_class.merge(fin[["ticker","quarter","Release_Date","surprise_B_MA"]],on=["ticker","quarter","Release_Date"],how="left")
ev=ev.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).reset_index(drop=True); ev["surprise_B_MA"]=ev["surprise_B_MA"].fillna(0)
LN2=np.log(2); HL=3.0; ev["prior_n_good"]=0; ev["pa_HL3"]=np.nan
for tk,g in ev.groupby("ticker"):
    hist=[]
    for ri in g.index.tolist():
        row=ev.loc[ri]; cur=row["Release_Date"]; ev.at[ri,"prior_n_good"]=len(hist)
        if hist:
            da=pd.to_datetime([d for d,_ in hist]); pa=np.array([p for _,p in hist])
            wts=np.exp(-LN2*((cur-da).days.values/365.25)/HL)
            ev.at[ri,"pa_HL3"]=(pa*wts).sum()/wts.sum() if wts.sum()>0 else np.nan
        if pd.notna(row["NP_R"]) and row["NP_R"]>=15 and pd.notna(row["post_ret"]): hist.append((cur,row["post_ret"]))
e=ev[(ev["NP_R"]>=15)&(ev["prior_n_good"]>=4)&(ev["pa_HL3"]>=5)].copy()

arr=np.array(vni_dates,dtype="datetime64[ns]")
def offd(ref,off):
    pos=np.searchsorted(arr,np.datetime64(ref),side="right")-1; t=pos+off
    return pd.Timestamp(arr[t]) if 0<=t<len(arr) else None
rows=[]
for _,row in e.iterrows():
    tk=row["ticker"]; ent=offd(row["Release_Date"],5); ex=offd(row["Release_Date"],5+25)
    if ent is None or ex is None or tk not in opens: continue
    p0=opens[tk].get(ent); p1=opens[tk].get(ex)
    if p0 is None or p1 is None or pd.isna(p0) or pd.isna(p1) or p0<=0: continue
    rows.append({"ticker":tk,"entry":ent,"ret":(p1/p0-1)*100,"surprise":row["surprise_B_MA"]})
tr=pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values("entry")

rt=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","fa_ratings_8l_hist.csv"),parse_dates=["time"]).sort_values("time")
tr=pd.merge_asof(tr, rt.rename(columns={"time":"rt_time"})[["ticker","rt_time","rating","route"]],
                 left_on="entry", right_on="rt_time", by="ticker", direction="backward")
print(f"LAG entries with fwd-25td return: {len(tr)} | matched 8L rating: {tr['rating'].notna().sum()}")
print("\n=== LAG fwd-25td (open->open, signal-level, no costs) by 8L rating at entry ===")
print(f"{'rating':>7}{'n':>6}{'mean%':>8}{'med%':>8}{'win%':>7}{'p10%':>8}")
for r in [1,2,3,4,5]:
    s=tr[tr["rating"]==r]["ret"]
    if len(s)<5: print(f"{r:>7}{len(s):>6}   (n too small)"); continue
    print(f"{r:>7}{len(s):>6}{s.mean():>8.2f}{s.median():>8.2f}{(s>0).mean()*100:>6.0f}%{s.quantile(0.10):>8.2f}")
s=tr[tr["rating"].isna()]["ret"]
print(f"{'none':>7}{len(s):>6}{s.mean():>8.2f}{s.median():>8.2f}{(s>0).mean()*100:>6.0f}%{s.quantile(0.10):>8.2f}")
g13=tr[tr["rating"]<=3]["ret"]; g45=tr[tr["rating"]>=4]["ret"]
print(f"\nrating<=3 (đầu tư): n={len(g13)} mean {g13.mean():+.2f}% win {(g13>0).mean()*100:.0f}%")
print(f"rating>=4 (đầu cơ): n={len(g45)} mean {g45.mean():+.2f}% win {(g45>0).mean()*100:.0f}%")
print(f"ALL               : n={len(tr)} mean {tr['ret'].mean():+.2f}% win {(tr['ret']>0).mean()*100:.0f}%")
# by route
print("\nby route (n>=20):")
for rte,g in tr.dropna(subset=["route"]).groupby("route"):
    if len(g)>=20: print(f"  {rte:<14} n={len(g):>4} mean {g['ret'].mean():+6.2f}% win {(g['ret']>0).mean()*100:.0f}%")
# time stability: by year for rating>=4
tr["yr"]=tr["entry"].dt.year
piv=tr.dropna(subset=["rating"]).assign(grp=np.where(tr.dropna(subset=["rating"])["rating"]<=3,"q13","q45")).groupby(["yr","grp"])["ret"].mean().unstack()
print("\nmean fwd-25td by year (q13 = rating<=3, q45 = rating>=4):")
print(piv.round(1).to_string())
EOF
input.description: Event study: LAG entries bucketed by 8L rating at entry

cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && python - <<'EOF' 2>&1 | tail -20
import numpy as np, pandas as pd, pickle, os
W = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
panel = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","v4f_panel_2014.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vni_dates = sorted(panel["time"].unique())
opens = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Open"])) for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
dtg = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","daily_comovement_dt5g.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
state_by = dtg.set_index("time")["state"]
with open(os.path.join(W,"earnings_surprise_data.pkl"),"rb") as f: fin = pickle.load(f)
fin["Release_Date"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]); FLOOR=1e9
fin["exp_B_MA"]=fin[["NP_P1","NP_P2","NP_P3","NP_P4"]].mean(axis=1)
fin["surprise_B_MA"]=((fin["NP_P0"]-fin["exp_B_MA"])/np.maximum(np.abs(fin["exp_B_MA"]),FLOOR)).clip(-5,5)
ev_class=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"earnings_events_classified.csv"),parse_dates=["Release_Date"])
ev=ev_class.merge(fin[["ticker","quarter","Release_Date","surprise_B_MA"]],on=["ticker","quarter","Release_Date"],how="left")
ev=ev.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).reset_index(drop=True); ev["surprise_B_MA"]=ev["surprise_B_MA"].fillna(0)
LN2=np.log(2); HL=3.0; ev["prior_n_good"]=0; ev["pa_HL3"]=np.nan
for tk,g in ev.groupby("ticker"):
    hist=[]
    for ri in g.index.tolist():
        row=ev.loc[ri]; cur=row["Release_Date"]; ev.at[ri,"prior_n_good"]=len(hist)
        if hist:
            da=pd.to_datetime([d for d,_ in hist]); pa=np.array([p for _,p in hist])
            wts=np.exp(-LN2*((cur-da).days.values/365.25)/HL)
            ev.at[ri,"pa_HL3"]=(pa*wts).sum()/wts.sum() if wts.sum()>0 else np.nan
        if pd.notna(row["NP_R"]) and row["NP_R"]>=15 and pd.notna(row["post_ret"]): hist.append((cur,row["post_ret"]))
e=ev[(ev["NP_R"]>=15)&(ev["prior_n_good"]>=4)&(ev["pa_HL3"]>=5)].copy()
arr=np.array(vni_dates,dtype="datetime64[ns]")
def offd(ref,off):
    pos=np.searchsorted(arr,np.datetime64(ref),side="right")-1; t=pos+off
    return pd.Timestamp(arr[t]) if 0<=t<len(arr) else None
rows=[]
for _,row in e.iterrows():
    tk=row["ticker"]; ent=offd(row["Release_Date"],5); ex=offd(row["Release_Date"],5+25)
    if ent is None or ex is None or tk not in opens: continue
    p0=opens[tk].get(ent); p1=opens[tk].get(ex)
    if p0 is None or p1 is None or pd.isna(p0) or pd.isna(p1) or p0<=0: continue
    st=state_by.get(ent, np.nan)
    rows.append({"ticker":tk,"entry":ent,"ret":(p1/p0-1)*100,"state":st})
tr=pd.DataFrame(rows); tr["entry"]=pd.to_datetime(tr["entry"]).astype("datetime64[ns]")
rt=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","fa_ratings_8l_hist.csv"),parse_dates=["time"]).sort_values("time")
rt["time"]=pd.to_datetime(rt["time"]).astype("datetime64[ns]")
tr=tr.sort_values("entry")
tr=pd.merge_asof(tr, rt.rename(columns={"time":"rt_time"})[["ticker","rt_time","rating"]],
                 left_on="entry", right_on="rt_time", by="ticker", direction="backward")
tr=tr.dropna(subset=["rating","state"])
tr["grp"]=np.where(tr["rating"]<=3,"q13(dau tu)","q45(dau co)")
SN={1:"CRISIS",2:"BEAR",3:"NEUTRAL",4:"BULL",5:"EXBULL"}
tr["st"]=tr["state"].map(SN)
print("=== LAG fwd-25td: 8L-rating-group x DT5G-state at entry ===")
out=tr.groupby(["st","grp"]).agg(n=("ret","size"),mean=("ret","mean"),win=("ret",lambda s:(s>0).mean()*100))
print(out.round(2).to_string())
print()
print("LAG entries per state:", tr["st"].value_counts().to_dict())
EOF

input.old_string: Files: pt_v4_full_faithful.py, pt_v4_variants_faithful.py,
input.new_string:
**LAG × 8L event-study ([REDACTED]10)**: LAG selection = PURE earnings track-record (NP_R≥15 & prior_n_good≥4 & pa_HL3≥5, T+5 entry, 25td, 10/8% S2) — NO 8L, predates it. Bucketing 2,198 entries by 8L rating-at-entry: NOT monotonic — rating 2-3 best (+7.1/+6.8% fwd25td), rating 1 LOWER (+3.9%, blue-chip surprises priced fast), rating 5 worst (+3.3%/54%); q13 vs q45 chỉ +0.9pp, đảo chiều theo năm → **LAG filter đã tự chọn quality ngầm (4+ quý tốt hiếm khi là junk), 8L thêm rất ít** — tái xác nhận "event/momentum books RESIST FA overlays". NGOẠI LỆ đúng pattern regime_size: **BEAR × rating≥4 = −2.37%/win 33% (n=33)** (CRISIS thì KHÔNG hại, q45 +4.35 — khớp capitulation-junk-bounce). Action khả dĩ (đều nhỏ): skip/halve rating≥4 khi BEAR + loại rating 5 (n=80); KHÔNG gate cứng 8L (rating 4 = 634 entries +5.94% — cắt là phá book). data/fa_ratings_8l_hist.csv.

---
name: v4-faithful-reproduction-2026
description: V4 (V121_ENS) reproduced as two real 25B ledgers with real flip liquidation — honest full-period CAGR ~14.2% (not 23.1%); capit sleeve +3.6pp on this host; switched-leg idealization quantified
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: ec3e71a4-ebe6-4058-81a6-bd076209b245
---

**V4 FULL-FAITHFUL reproduction ([REDACTED]10, `pt_v4_full_faithful.py [--capit]`)** — user asked to reproduce V4's REAL number as faithfully as possible. Finding that triggered it: even the LIVE `pt_v4_dt5g.py` builds the SWITCHED leg idealized (lines ~522-542: return-switching between two independently-running sims, flat 0.5%/flip, SWITCH events "virtual", inactive book keeps compounding and flips inherit its NAV) — **V4's switched leg had never been a real wallet anywhere**.

Faithful build = two REAL 25B ledgers (real partition, like two accounts):
- **Book A (BAL 25B)**: real BA-v11 pkl signal + SV_TIGHT + overheat-AVOID, TIER_BAL tw10%, max12, hold45, stop−20%, DT5G parking {3:0.7} E1VFVN30, real fills (T+1 Open, slip, 20%ADV cap, 0.3%TC).
- **Book B (SWITCHED 25B, ONE ledger)**: sig_AH==1 → BA-v11 restricted top-30; ==0 → LAGGED earnings-surprise schedule (rebuilt exactly: NP_R≥15 & prior_n_good≥4 & pa_HL3≥5, T+5 entry, 25td hold, 10%/8% S2 sizing, no stop). **On each of 28 flips the outgoing mode's positions are SOLD FOR REAL at T+1 Open** (64 MODE_FLIP sells, 515B turnover) and the incoming mode rebuys from actual cash. Engine gained additive param `force_close_tiers_dates`.
- sig_AH reused from rscap CSV (point-in-time M1+M3r AND-HOLD, NAV-independent).

**RESULT (full 2014→2026-06, 50B):**
| | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe |
|---|---|---|---|
| V4 FAITHFUL (A+B) | **14.20%** | −22.2% | 1.10 |
| V4 FAITHFUL + CAPIT | **17.83% (+3.62pp)** | −23.1% | 1.20 |
| V4 recombined (ref) | 23.06% | −24.1% | 1.56 |
| VNINDEX B&H | 11.42% | −45.3% | 0.69 |

Reads:
1. **Honest V4 ≈ 14.2%/Sh1.10, NOT 23.1%/1.56** — idealization gap ≈ 8.9pp full-period (consistent with [[v5_prodspec_integrity_audit]] ~12pp finding). Still beats VNI with HALF the DD → the system's real value is risk-adjusted.
2. **Faithful is a LOWER bound on the switched leg**: as-built, after a flip the book waits for NEW signals (sparse V30 tier → sits in cash/ETF), whereas a real trader could replicate the incoming book's CURRENT target portfolio at flip. Recombined = costless instant teleport (upper). Truth in between; not yet quantified.
3. **CAPIT committed sleeve on this two-book host: +3.62pp** (14.20→17.83, Sh 1.10→1.20, DD ≈) — stronger than the single-book +2.66pp (two ledgers hold more total idle cash at washouts). Deployable capit range: **+2.5–3.6pp**, decaying with NAV (capacity, see [[capitulation-overlay-accounting-fix-2026]]).
4. Capacity again: BAL faithful at 25B = 14.42% vs at 50B = 12.85% (smaller book fills better).
5. Book B composition: LAG trades dominate (871 buys vs 93 V30 momentum buys) — in V11 mode the top-30-restricted BA-v11 signal is SPARSE, the faithful book parks ETF/cash; the recombined VN30 leg's continuous full investment is a big chunk of the gap.

**VARIANTS SHOWDOWN (`pt_v4_variants_faithful.py`, same framework, same Book A): FAITHFUL RANKING REVERSES — V2/V2.1 STATIC BEAT V4.**
| faithful system | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| V1 = BAL+VN30 static | 14.62% | −24.5 | 1.15 | 0.60 |
| V2 = BAL+LAGv12 static | 20.63% | **−19.9** | 1.57 | **1.04** |
| **V2.1 = BAL+LAGv12.1 static** | **21.23%** | −20.6 | **1.58** | 1.03 |
| V4 = BAL+SWITCHED | 14.20% | −22.2 | 1.10 | 0.64 |

Recombined ranking was V4(23.1) > V2(22.2) > V1(20.1) — faithful ranking is V2.1 > V2 >> V1 ≈ V4. Standalone books: LAG v12.1 alone **25.33%/Sh1.46** (LAG leg was ALWAYS an honest single-wallet sim in prodspec → reproduces nearly fully; V2 gap recombined→faithful only −1.6pp = BAL-side idealization). SWITCHED standalone 13.98%/Sh0.87 — **the ensemble switch DESTROYS ~10.5pp vs simply holding LAG**, because in real execution every flip to V11-mode liquidates LAG and then the top-30-restricted BA-v11 signal is SPARSE (93 buys/12y) → dead capital in ETF/cash; the recombined switch teleports into a continuously-compounding VN30 book instead. Same lesson as [[dt4_ensemble_smart_integration]] (re-validate on prod/faithful, never reduced harness) — extended: **the V121_ENS switch never survived a real ledger; V4's entire edge over V2 was recombination artifact**. Faithful-switch is a lower bound (waits for new signals post-flip), but it would need +7pp to catch V2.1 — implausible. **Honest champion = V2.1 (BAL + LAG v12.1, static, no switching): 21.23%/Sh1.58/DD−20.6** (+capit sleeve stacks on top). Caveat: LAG capacity at 25B fine, degrades at bigger NAV like everything else.

**LAG capacity curve (all-in test)**: LAG v12.1 standalone @25B 25.33%/Sh1.46/DD−29.4 → @50B **22.00%/Sh1.35/DD−28.5** → @100B 20.40%/Sh1.31. All-in 50B LAG vs V2.1 (BAL25+LAG25 21.23%/Sh1.58/DD−20.6): chỉ +0.77pp CAGR nhưng DD sâu hơn 8pp, Sharpe/Calmar tệ hơn rõ → **GIỮ combo V2.1, không all-in LAG**. Lý do cấu trúc: LAG avg-deployed chỉ ~40% (event-driven, 60% thời gian ngồi cash) → ghép BAL = tiền làm việc khi LAG nghỉ, diversification gần như miễn phí; cộng fragility 1-strategy (1 họ tín hiệu earnings-surprise, có thể decay) → Kelly-dưới-bất-định không cho all-in mean cao nhất.

aiTitle: Review V5 backtest results and data availability

content.text:
**Chưa — book LAG hoàn toàn không biết 8L tồn tại.** Nó ra đời trước 8L và chưa từng được nối vào. Nhưng kết quả kiểm tra thực nghiệm cho thấy điều thú vị hơn: *nó gần như không cần*.

## Cơ chế chọn mã của LAG (thuần earnings track-record)

1. `NP_R ≥ 15%` — quý vừa công bố lãi tăng ≥15% YoY
2. `prior_n_good ≥ 4` — công ty đã có ≥4 quý tốt như vậy trong quá khứ
3. `pa_HL3 ≥ 5%` — cổ phiếu có "thói quen" tăng ≥5% sau các tin tốt cũ (trung bình suy giảm half-life 3 năm, chỉ dùng sự kiện QUÁ KHỨ — point-in-time)
4. Vào T+5 sau công bố, giữ đúng 25 phiên, size 10%/8% theo độ lớn surprise

Không FA tier, không 8L, không định giá.

## 8L có thêm giá trị không? — Event study 2,198 entry

| 8L rating tại entry | n | mean fwd-25td | win% |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 (AAA) | 202 | +3.94% | 59% |
| **2** | 498 | **+7.08%** | 65% |
| **3** | 784 | **+6.81%** | 64% |
| 4 | 634 | +5.94% | 60% |
| 5 | 80 | +3.34% | 54% |

**Không đơn điệu** — và đó là phát hiện chính:
- **Bộ lọc LAG đã tự chọn quality ngầm**: công ty có 4+ quý tăng trưởng ≥15% hiếm khi là junk. Cộng thêm 8L chỉ tách được ~0.9pp (q≤3: +6.51% vs q≥4: +5.65%), và lợi thế này **đảo chiều theo năm** (q45 thắng 2017/2020/2023/2025) — không đáng tin để gate.
- **Rating 1 lại KÉM nhất nhóm đầu tư** (+3.94%): blue-chip được cover dày, surprise bị price-in nhanh → ít drift sau tin. Đây là lý do sâu vì sao gate 8L cứng sẽ *phá* book — nó sẽ cắt rating 4 (634 entries, +5.94%) và dồn vào rating 1 kém drift.

## Ngoại lệ duy nhất — đúng pattern regime_size đã biết

| State tại entry | q≤3 | q≥4 |
|---|---|---|
| **BEAR** | +1.17% / 54% | **−2.37% / 33%** |
| CRISIS | +2.87% | +4.35% (junk bounce — khớp finding capitulation) |
| NEUTRAL/BULL/EXBULL | ≈ nhau (chênh ~1pp) |

Mã yếu (rating≥4) chỉ thật sự gây hại khi vào lệnh trong **BEAR** — y hệt kết luận regime_size trên book BAL ("rating tuyệt đối ≥4 giảm nửa size khi BEAR/CRISIS"), thậm chí ở đây CRISIS còn không hại.

## Khuyến nghị

- **Không gate cứng 8L vào LAG** — tái xác nhận lần thứ ba bài học "momentum/event book RESISTS FA overlays".
- Hai tinh chỉnh nhỏ, miễn phí về rủi ro nếu muốn: (a) **skip/giảm nửa size entry rating≥4 khi DT5G=BEAR** (chỉ 33 lệnh/12 năm, mean −2.4%), (b) loại rating 5 (80 lệnh, kéo lùi mean). Cả hai cộng lại chỉ ~0.1–0.2pp ở cấp book — đáng làm vì nhất quán triết lý phòng thủ, nhưng đừng kỳ vọng đổi đời.
- Chỗ 8L thật sự thuộc về trong kiến trúc V2.1: **sleeve capitulation** (rổ golden = 8L quality × PB_z) đang dùng đúng phần cash mà LAG để không — đó mới là nơi 8L đóng góp lớn (+2.5–3.6pp), chứ không phải bên trong bộ lọc LAG.

Đã lưu toàn bộ vào memory (kèm `data/fa_ratings_8l_hist.csv` để tái lập).

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
pt_v21_faithful.py — V2.1F: the faithful champion, assembled.\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
V2.1F = BAL 25B + LAG-v12.1 25B (static, no switching)
        + regime-size: LAG entries with 8L rating>=4 HALVED when DT5G==BEAR at signal
        + committed capitulation sleeve (playbook) in EACH book, sized on that
          book's own free cash (two real accounts each running the playbook)
All transaction-level: T+1 Open fills, slippage, 20%-ADV caps, 0.3%TC, no margin.

Ablation reported:
  V2.1 plain            = BAL + LAG121                       (prior run, recomputed refs)
  V2.1 + BEAR-rule      = BAL + LAG121_B
  V2.1 + CAPIT          = BAL_cap + LAG121_cap
  V2.1F (full)          = BAL_cap + LAG121_B_cap             <- the system
Run: python pt_v21_faithful.py
"""
import sys, os, pickle
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
import simulate_holistic_nav as shn
from simulate_holistic_nav import simulate

W = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
BOOK = 25_000_000_000
EVENTS = [("2014-05-08",1,False),("2015-08-24",3,False),("2016-01-18",3,True),
          ("2018-05-28",1,False),("2020-03-12",2,False),
          ("2022-04-20",1,False),("2022-06-20",2,True),("2022-09-29",2,True),
          ("2023-10-31",1,False),("2024-04-19",4,False),("2025-04-03",4,False),
          ("2026-03-09",3,False)]
def size_of(state, grind):
    return (1.0 if state == 1 else 0.5) * (0.5 if grind else 1.0)

print("[1] Loading data...")
panel = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","v4f_panel_2014.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vni_dates = sorted(panel["time"].unique())
prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"])) for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
opens  = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Open"]))  for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
liqlk  = {(r.ticker, r.time): r.liq_adv for r in panel.itertuples()}
dtg = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","daily_comovement_dt5g.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
state_by_date = {t: int(s) for t, s in zip(dtg["time"], dtg["state"])}
last_st = None
for d in vni_dates:
    if d in state_by_date: last_st = state_by_date[d]
    elif last_st is not None: state_by_date[d] = last_st

print("[2] LAG schedule + 8L BEAR rule...")
with open(os.path.join(W,"earnings_surprise_data.pkl"),"rb") as f: fin = pickle.load(f)
fin["Release_Date"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]); FLOOR=1e9
fin["exp_B_MA"]=fin[["NP_P1","NP_P2","NP_P3","NP_P4"]].mean(axis=1)
fin["surprise_B_MA"]=((fin["NP_P0"]-fin["exp_B_MA"])/np.maximum(np.abs(fin["exp_B_MA"]),FLOOR)).clip(-5,5)
ev_class=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"earnings_events_classified.csv"),parse_dates=["Release_Date"])
ev=ev_class.merge(fin[["ticker","quarter","Release_Date","surprise_B_MA"]],on=["ticker","quarter","Release_Date"],how="left")
ev=ev.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).reset_index(drop=True); ev["surprise_B_MA"]=ev["surprise_B_MA"].fillna(0)
LN2=np.log(2); HL=3.0; ev["prior_n_good"]=0; ev["pa_HL3"]=np.nan
for tk,g in ev.groupby("ticker"):
    hist=[]
    for ri in g.index.tolist():
        row=ev.loc[ri]; cur=row["Release_Date"]; ev.at[ri,"prior_n_good"]=len(hist)
        if hist:
            da=pd.to_datetime([d for d,_ in hist]); pa=np.array([p for _,p in hist])
            wts=np.exp(-LN2*((cur-da).days.values/365.25)/HL)
            ev.at[ri,"pa_HL3"]=(pa*wts).sum()/wts.sum() if wts.sum()>0 else np.nan
        if pd.notna(row["NP_R"]) and row["NP_R"]>=15 and pd.notna(row["post_ret"]): hist.append((cur,row["post_ret"]))
e_hl3=ev[(ev["NP_R"]>=15)&(ev["prior_n_good"]>=4)&(ev["pa_HL3"]>=5)].copy()
arr=np.array(vni_dates,dtype="datetime64[ns]")
def offd(ref,off):
    pos=np.searchsorted(arr,np.datetime64(ref),side="right")-1; t=pos+off
    return pd.Timestamp(arr[t]) if 0<=t<len(arr) else None
base_rows=[]
for _,row in e_hl3.iterrows():
    tk=row["ticker"]; entry=offd(row["Release_Date"],5)
    if entry is None or tk not in prices: continue
    sd=offd(entry,-1)
    if sd is None or sd not in prices[tk]: continue
    base_rows.append({"time":sd,"ticker":tk,"hi":row["surprise_B_MA"]>0.5,"Close":prices[tk][sd]})
lagdf=pd.DataFrame(base_rows).sort_values("time")
lagdf["time"]=pd.to_datetime(lagdf["time"]).astype("datetime64[ns]")
rt=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","fa_ratings_8l_hist.csv"),parse_dates=["time"]).sort_values("time")
rt["time"]=pd.to_datetime(rt["time"]).astype("datetime64[ns]")
lagdf=pd.merge_asof(lagdf, rt.rename(columns={"time":"rt_time"})[["ticker","rt_time","rating"]],
                    left_on="time", right_on="rt_time", by="ticker", direction="backward")
lagdf["bear_weak"]=(lagdf["time"].map(lambda d: state_by_date.get(d,3))==2) & (lagdf["rating"]>=4)
def mk_sig(bear_rule):
    d=lagdf.copy()
    if bear_rule:
        d["play_type"]=np.where(d["bear_weak"], np.where(d["hi"],"LAG_HI_B","LAG_LO_B"),
                                np.where(d["hi"],"LAG_HI","LAG_LO"))
    else:
        d["play_type"]=np.where(d["hi"],"LAG_HI","LAG_LO")
    d["ta"]=400.0
    return d[["time","ticker","play_type","ta","Close"]]
n_weak=int(lagdf["bear_weak"].sum())
print(f"    LAG entries {len(lagdf)} | BEAR x rating>=4 (halved): {n_weak}")
shn.TIER_PRIORITY.update({"LAG_HI":88,"LAG_LO":82,"LAG_HI_B":88,"LAG_LO_B":82})
LAG_TW   = {"LAG_HI":0.10,"LAG_LO":0.08}
LAG_TW_B = {**LAG_TW, "LAG_HI_B":0.05, "LAG_LO_B":0.04}

LIQ = dict(liquidity_volume_pct=0.20, max_fill_days=5, liquidity_lookup=liqlk, exit_slippage_tiered=True)
BASE_KW = dict(max_positions=12, min_hold=2, slippage=0.001, init_nav=BOOK,
               deposit_annual=0.0, borrow_annual=0.10, state_by_date=state_by_date,
               open_prices=opens, t1_open_exec=True, **LIQ)

def run_lag(sig, tw, label, extra=None):
    tiers=sorted(set(sig["play_type"]))
    lagts=set(t for t in tiers if t.startswith("LAG"))
    kw=dict(hold_days=25, stop_loss=-0.99,
            stop_exempt_tiers=lagts | set((extra or {}).get("stop_exempt_tiers",set())),
            hold_days_by_tier={**{t:25 for t in lagts}, **(extra or {}).get("hold_days_by_tier",{})},
            tier_position_limit={**{t:12 for t in lagts}, **(extra or {}).get("tier_position_limit",{})})
    if extra and "slot_exempt_tiers" in extra: kw["slot_exempt_tiers"]=extra["slot_exempt_tiers"]
    nav,_=simulate(sig,prices,vni_dates,allowed_tiers=tiers,tier_weights=tw,name=label,**BASE_KW,**kw)
    nav["time"]=pd.to_datetime(nav["time"])
    return nav

def add_capit(sig, navlog, tw, tag):
    elig=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","capit_event_elig_full.csv"),parse_dates=["event"])
    basecash=navlog.set_index("time")["cash_pct"]/100.0
    rows,tw2,tiers=[],dict(tw),[]
    for i,(ds,st,gr) in enumerate(EVENTS):
        d=pd.Timestamp(ds); e=elig[elig["event"]==d].copy()
        e=e[[t in prices and d in prices[t] for t in e["ticker"]]]
        g=e[e["pbz"]<-1]; c=e[e["pbz"]<0]
        pick=g if len(g)>=3 else (c if len(c)>=3 else e)
        pick=pick.nsmallest(15,"pbz") if len(pick)>15 else pick
        names=list(pick["ticker"])
        if len(names)<3: continue
        pos=basecash.index.searchsorted(d); cf=float(basecash.iloc[max(0,pos-2):pos+1].mean())
        wt=size_of(st,gr)*max(cf,0.0)
        if wt<=0.005: continue
        pt=f"CAPIT{tag}_E{i}"; shn.TIER_PRIORITY[pt]=95
        tw2[pt]=wt/len(names); tiers.append(pt)
        for t in names: rows.append({"time":d,"ticker":t,"play_type":pt,"ta":500.0,"Close":prices[t][d]})
    extra=dict(hold_days_by_tier={t:60 for t in tiers}, stop_exempt_tiers=set(tiers),
               slot_exempt_tiers=set(tiers), tier_position_limit={t:15 for t in tiers})
    return pd.concat([sig,pd.DataFrame(rows)],ignore_index=True), tw2, extra

def metrics(s):
    s=s.dropna(); r=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1; dd=(s/s.cummax()-1).min(); sh=r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    return cagr*100, dd*100, sh, (cagr/abs(dd) if dd<0 else 0)

# ── BAL book arms: reuse saved logs from pt_v4_full_faithful (identical spec) ──
navA     = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","pt_v4_full_faithful_nav_A.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
navA_cap = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","pt_v4_full_faithful_nav_A_cap.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
sA, sAc = navA.set_index("time")["nav"], navA_cap.set_index("time")["nav"]

# ── LAG book arms ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
print("[3] LAG arms...")
nav_l    = run_lag(mk_sig(False), LAG_TW,   "LAG121")
nav_lB   = run_lag(mk_sig(True),  LAG_TW_B, "LAG121_B")
sigc, twc, exc = add_capit(mk_sig(False), nav_l, LAG_TW, "L")
nav_lC   = run_lag(sigc, twc, "LAG121_cap", exc)
sigbc, twbc, exbc = add_capit(mk_sig(True), nav_lB, LAG_TW_B, "LB")
nav_lBC  = run_lag(sigbc, twbc, "LAG121_B_cap", exbc)
for lbl,nv in [("LAG121",nav_l),("LAG121_B",nav_lB),("LAG121_cap",nav_lC),("LAG121_B_cap",nav_lBC)]:
    s=nv.set_index("time")["nav"]; c,d,sh,cal=metrics(s)
    print(f"    {lbl:<14}: CAGR {c:6.2f}%  MaxDD {d:6.1f}%  Sharpe {sh:.2f}  NAV {s.iloc[-1]/1e9:.1f}B")

# ── assemble systems ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
print("\n" + "="*94)
print("V2.1F ABLATION (faithful, two real 25B ledgers, 2014 -> now)")
print("="*94)
combos = [("V2.1 plain (BAL+LAG121)",            sA,  nav_l.set_index("time")["nav"]),
          ("V2.1 + BEAR-rule",                   sA,  nav_lB.set_index("time")["nav"]),
          ("V2.1 + CAPIT",                       sAc, nav_lC.set_index("time")["nav"]),
          ("V2.1F FULL (BEAR-rule + CAPIT)",     sAc, nav_lBC.set_index("time")["nav"])]
print(f"  {'system':<36}{'CAGR':>8}{'MaxDD':>9}{'Sharpe':>8}{'Calmar':>8}{'NAV':>9}")
res={}
for lbl,a,b in combos:
    s=(a+b.reindex(a.index).ffill()).dropna()
    c,d,sh,cal=metrics(s); res[lbl]=(c,d,sh,cal)
    print(f"  {lbl:<36}{c:>7.2f}%{d:>8.1f}%{sh:>8.2f}{cal:>8.2f}{s.iloc[-1]/1e9:>8.1f}B")
print(f"\n  ref V4 faithful 14.20%/Sh1.10 | V4 faithful+capit 17.83%/Sh1.20 | VNI 11.42%/Sh0.69")
for name,nv in [("lag121_b",nav_lB),("lag121_cap",nav_lC),("lag121_b_cap",nav_lBC)]:
    nv.to_csv(os.path.join(W,f"data/pt_v21_{name}.csv"),index=False)
print("  Saved: data/pt_v21_*.csv")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
pt_v21_faithful.py — V2.1F: the faithful champion, assembled.\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
V2.1F = BAL 25B + LAG-v12.1 25B (static, no switching)
        + regime-size: LAG entries with 8L rating>=4 HALVED when DT5G==BEAR at signal
        + committed capitulation sleeve (playbook) in EACH book, sized on that
          book's own free cash (two real accounts each running the playbook)
All transaction-level: T+1 Open fills, slippage, 20%-ADV caps, 0.3%TC, no margin.

Ablation reported:
  V2.1 plain            = BAL + LAG121                       (prior run, recomputed refs)
  V2.1 + BEAR-rule      = BAL + LAG121_B
  V2.1 + CAPIT          = BAL_cap + LAG121_cap
  V2.1F (full)          = BAL_cap + LAG121_B_cap             <- the system
Run: python pt_v21_faithful.py
"""
import sys, os, pickle
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
import simulate_holistic_nav as shn
from simulate_holistic_nav import simulate

W = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
BOOK = 25_000_000_000
EVENTS = [("2014-05-08",1,False),("2015-08-24",3,False),("2016-01-18",3,True),
          ("2018-05-28",1,False),("2020-03-12",2,False),
          ("2022-04-20",1,False),("2022-06-20",2,True),("2022-09-29",2,True),
          ("2023-10-31",1,False),("2024-04-19",4,False),("2025-04-03",4,False),
          ("2026-03-09",3,False)]
def size_of(state, grind):
    return (1.0 if state == 1 else 0.5) * (0.5 if grind else 1.0)

print("[1] Loading data...")
panel = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","v4f_panel_2014.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vni_dates = sorted(panel["time"].unique())
prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"])) for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
opens  = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Open"]))  for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
liqlk  = {(r.ticker, r.time): r.liq_adv for r in panel.itertuples()}
dtg = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","daily_comovement_dt5g.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
state_by_date = {t: int(s) for t, s in zip(dtg["time"], dtg["state"])}
last_st = None
for d in vni_dates:
    if d in state_by_date: last_st = state_by_date[d]
    elif last_st is not None: state_by_date[d] = last_st

print("[2] LAG schedule + 8L BEAR rule...")
with open(os.path.join(W,"earnings_surprise_data.pkl"),"rb") as f: fin = pickle.load(f)
fin["Release_Date"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]); FLOOR=1e9
fin["exp_B_MA"]=fin[["NP_P1","NP_P2","NP_P3","NP_P4"]].mean(axis=1)
fin["surprise_B_MA"]=((fin["NP_P0"]-fin["exp_B_MA"])/np.maximum(np.abs(fin["exp_B_MA"]),FLOOR)).clip(-5,5)
ev_class=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"earnings_events_classified.csv"),parse_dates=["Release_Date"])
ev=ev_class.merge(fin[["ticker","quarter","Release_Date","surprise_B_MA"]],on=["ticker","quarter","Release_Date"],how="left")
ev=ev.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).reset_index(drop=True); ev["surprise_B_MA"]=ev["surprise_B_MA"].fillna(0)
LN2=np.log(2); HL=3.0; ev["prior_n_good"]=0; ev["pa_HL3"]=np.nan
for tk,g in ev.groupby("ticker"):
    hist=[]
    for ri in g.index.tolist():
        row=ev.loc[ri]; cur=row["Release_Date"]; ev.at[ri,"prior_n_good"]=len(hist)
        if hist:
            da=pd.to_datetime([d for d,_ in hist]); pa=np.array([p for _,p in hist])
            wts=np.exp(-LN2*((cur-da).days.values/365.25)/HL)
            ev.at[ri,"pa_HL3"]=(pa*wts).sum()/wts.sum() if wts.sum()>0 else np.nan
        if pd.notna(row["NP_R"]) and row["NP_R"]>=15 and pd.notna(row["post_ret"]): hist.append((cur,row["post_ret"]))
e_hl3=ev[(ev["NP_R"]>=15)&(ev["prior_n_good"]>=4)&(ev["pa_HL3"]>=5)].copy()
arr=np.array(vni_dates,dtype="datetime64[ns]")
def offd(ref,off):
    pos=np.searchsorted(arr,np.datetime64(ref),side="right")-1; t=pos+off
    return pd.Timestamp(arr[t]) if 0<=t<len(arr) else None
base_rows=[]
for _,row in e_hl3.iterrows():
    tk=row["ticker"]; entry=offd(row["Release_Date"],5)
    if entry is None or tk not in prices: continue
    sd=offd(entry,-1)
    if sd is None or sd not in prices[tk]: continue
    base_rows.append({"time":sd,"ticker":tk,"hi":row["surprise_B_MA"]>0.5,"Close":prices[tk][sd]})
lagdf=pd.DataFrame(base_rows).sort_values("time")
lagdf["time"]=pd.to_datetime(lagdf["time"]).astype("datetime64[ns]")
rt=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","fa_ratings_8l_hist.csv"),parse_dates=["time"]).sort_values("time")
rt["time"]=pd.to_datetime(rt["time"]).astype("datetime64[ns]")
lagdf=pd.merge_asof(lagdf, rt.rename(columns={"time":"rt_time"})[["ticker","rt_time","rating"]],
                    left_on="time", right_on="rt_time", by="ticker", direction="backward")
lagdf["bear_weak"]=(lagdf["time"].map(lambda d: state_by_date.get(d,3))==2) & (lagdf["rating"]>=4)
def mk_sig(bear_rule):
    d=lagdf.copy()
    if bear_rule:
        d["play_type"]=np.where(d["bear_weak"], np.where(d["hi"],"LAG_HI_B","LAG_LO_B"),
                                np.where(d["hi"],"LAG_HI","LAG_LO"))
    else:
        d["play_type"]=np.where(d["hi"],"LAG_HI","LAG_LO")
    d["ta"]=400.0
    return d[["time","ticker","play_type","ta","Close"]]
n_weak=int(lagdf["bear_weak"].sum())
print(f"    LAG entries {len(lagdf)} | BEAR x rating>=4 (halved): {n_weak}")
shn.TIER_PRIORITY.update({"LAG_HI":88,"LAG_LO":82,"LAG_HI_B":88,"LAG_LO_B":82})
LAG_TW   = {"LAG_HI":0.10,"LAG_LO":0.08}
LAG_TW_B = {**LAG_TW, "LAG_HI_B":0.05, "LAG_LO_B":0.04}

LIQ = dict(liquidity_volume_pct=0.20, max_fill_days=5, liquidity_lookup=liqlk, exit_slippage_tiered=True)
BASE_KW = dict(max_positions=12, min_hold=2, slippage=0.001, init_nav=BOOK,
               deposit_annual=0.0, borrow_annual=0.10, state_by_date=state_by_date,
               open_prices=opens, t1_open_exec=True, **LIQ)

def run_lag(sig, tw, label, extra=None):
    tiers=sorted(set(sig["play_type"]))
    lagts=set(t for t in tiers if t.startswith("LAG"))
    kw=dict(hold_days=25, stop_loss=-0.99,
            stop_exempt_tiers=lagts | set((extra or {}).get("stop_exempt_tiers",set())),
            hold_days_by_tier={**{t:25 for t in lagts}, **(extra or {}).get("hold_days_by_tier",{})},
            tier_position_limit={**{t:12 for t in lagts}, **(extra or {}).get("tier_position_limit",{})})
    if extra and "slot_exempt_tiers" in extra: kw["slot_exempt_tiers"]=extra["slot_exempt_tiers"]
    nav,_=simulate(sig,prices,vni_dates,allowed_tiers=tiers,tier_weights=tw,name=label,**BASE_KW,**kw)
    nav["time"]=pd.to_datetime(nav["time"])
    return nav

def add_capit(sig, navlog, tw, tag):
    elig=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","capit_event_elig_full.csv"),parse_dates=["event"])
    basecash=navlog.set_index("time")["cash_pct"]/100.0
    rows,tw2,tiers=[],dict(tw),[]
    for i,(ds,st,gr) in enumerate(EVENTS):
        d=pd.Timestamp(ds); e=elig[elig["event"]==d].copy()
        e=e[[t in prices and d in prices[t] for t in e["ticker"]]]
        g=e[e["pbz"]<-1]; c=e[e["pbz"]<0]
        pick=g if len(g)>=3 else (c if len(c)>=3 else e)
        pick=pick.nsmallest(15,"pbz") if len(pick)>15 else pick
        names=list(pick["ticker"])
        if len(names)<3: continue
        pos=basecash.index.searchsorted(d); cf=float(basecash.iloc[max(0,pos-2):pos+1].mean())
        wt=size_of(st,gr)*max(cf,0.0)
        if wt<=0.005: continue
        pt=f"CAPIT{tag}_E{i}"; shn.TIER_PRIORITY[pt]=95
        tw2[pt]=wt/len(names); tiers.append(pt)
        for t in names: rows.append({"time":d,"ticker":t,"play_type":pt,"ta":500.0,"Close":prices[t][d]})
    extra=dict(hold_days_by_tier={t:60 for t in tiers}, stop_exempt_tiers=set(tiers),
               slot_exempt_tiers=set(tiers), tier_position_limit={t:15 for t in tiers})
    return pd.concat([sig,pd.DataFrame(rows)],ignore_index=True), tw2, extra

def metrics(s):
    s=s.dropna(); r=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1; dd=(s/s.cummax()-1).min(); sh=r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    return cagr*100, dd*100, sh, (cagr/abs(dd) if dd<0 else 0)

# ── BAL book arms: reuse saved logs from pt_v4_full_faithful (identical spec) ──
navA     = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","pt_v4_full_faithful_nav_A.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
navA_cap = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","pt_v4_full_faithful_nav_A_cap.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
sA, sAc = navA.set_index("time")["nav"], navA_cap.set_index("time")["nav"]

# ── LAG book arms ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
print("[3] LAG arms...")
nav_l    = run_lag(mk_sig(False), LAG_TW,   "LAG121")
nav_lB   = run_lag(mk_sig(True),  LAG_TW_B, "LAG121_B")
sigc, twc, exc = add_capit(mk_sig(False), nav_l, LAG_TW, "L")
nav_lC   = run_lag(sigc, twc, "LAG121_cap", exc)
sigbc, twbc, exbc = add_capit(mk_sig(True), nav_lB, LAG_TW_B, "LB")
nav_lBC  = run_lag(sigbc, twbc, "LAG121_B_cap", exbc)
for lbl,nv in [("LAG121",nav_l),("LAG121_B",nav_lB),("LAG121_cap",nav_lC),("LAG121_B_cap",nav_lBC)]:
    s=nv.set_index("time")["nav"]; c,d,sh,cal=metrics(s)
    print(f"    {lbl:<14}: CAGR {c:6.2f}%  MaxDD {d:6.1f}%  Sharpe {sh:.2f}  NAV {s.iloc[-1]/1e9:.1f}B")

# ── assemble systems ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
print("\n" + "="*94)
print("V2.1F ABLATION (faithful, two real 25B ledgers, 2014 -> now)")
print("="*94)
combos = [("V2.1 plain (BAL+LAG121)",            sA,  nav_l.set_index("time")["nav"]),
          ("V2.1 + BEAR-rule",                   sA,  nav_lB.set_index("time")["nav"]),
          ("V2.1 + CAPIT",                       sAc, nav_lC.set_index("time")["nav"]),
          ("V2.1F FULL (BEAR-rule + CAPIT)",     sAc, nav_lBC.set_index("time")["nav"])]
print(f"  {'system':<36}{'CAGR':>8}{'MaxDD':>9}{'Sharpe':>8}{'Calmar':>8}{'NAV':>9}")
res={}
for lbl,a,b in combos:
    s=(a+b.reindex(a.index).ffill()).dropna()
    c,d,sh,cal=metrics(s); res[lbl]=(c,d,sh,cal)
    print(f"  {lbl:<36}{c:>7.2f}%{d:>8.1f}%{sh:>8.2f}{cal:>8.2f}{s.iloc[-1]/1e9:>8.1f}B")
print(f"\n  ref V4 faithful 14.20%/Sh1.10 | V4 faithful+capit 17.83%/Sh1.20 | VNI 11.42%/Sh0.69")
for name,nv in [("lag121_b",nav_lB),("lag121_cap",nav_lC),("lag121_b_cap",nav_lBC)]:
    nv.to_csv(os.path.join(W,f"data/pt_v21_{name}.csv"),index=False)
print("  Saved: data/pt_v21_*.csv")

**V2.1F ASSEMBLY (`pt_v21_faithful.py`, [REDACTED]10)** — ablation faithful (cùng 2 ledger 25B):
| hệ | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| V2.1 plain | 21.60% | −20.5 | 1.59 | 1.05 |
| V2.1 + BEAR-rule | 21.36% | −20.5 | 1.58 | 1.04 |
| **V2.1 + CAPIT (CHỐT)** | **23.86%** | −20.8 | **1.71** | **1.15** |
| V2.1F full (BEAR+CAPIT) | 23.73% | −20.8 | 1.70 | 1.14 |

(1) **CAPIT sleeve trên V2.1: +2.26pp, Sh 1.59→1.71, DD nguyên** — sleeve xếp chồng đẹp lên hệ tĩnh (LAG cash ~60% là host lý tưởng). (2) **BEAR-rule (halve rating≥4 khi BEAR, n=37) = −0.24pp trong integrated test → KHÔNG deploy** dù event-study ủng hộ (−2.37%/33%win signal-level) — n quá nhỏ, cash thay thế nằm 0%; lần nữa: signal-edge nhỏ không sống sót integration (regime_size chỉ thắng trên BAL book, không phải LAG). (3) **Hệ chốt = V2.1+CAPIT 23.86%/Sh1.71/DD−20.8 — số FAITHFUL này ≈ recombined V4 23.06%/Sh1.56 nhưng là máu thật, DD nông hơn 3.3pp**; vs V4 faithful+capit 17.83% là +6pp. Forward thực tế trừ ~1-1.5pp → ~22%. ⚠️ fill-order noise ±0.5pp giữa các run (LAG121 25.33 vs 25.84 hai script, tie-break ta bằng nhau) — ablation trong-cùng-run mới sạch.
