toolUseResult.originalFile:
---
name: v4-faithful-reproduction-2026
description: V4 (V121_ENS) reproduced as two real 25B ledgers with real flip liquidation — honest full-period CAGR ~14.2% (not 23.1%); capit sleeve +3.6pp on this host; switched-leg idealization quantified
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: ec3e71a4-ebe6-4058-81a6-bd076209b245
---

**V4 FULL-FAITHFUL reproduction ([REDACTED]10, `pt_v4_full_faithful.py [--capit]`)** — user asked to reproduce V4's REAL number as faithfully as possible. Finding that triggered it: even the LIVE `pt_v4_dt5g.py` builds the SWITCHED leg idealized (lines ~522-542: return-switching between two independently-running sims, flat 0.5%/flip, SWITCH events "virtual", inactive book keeps compounding and flips inherit its NAV) — **V4's switched leg had never been a real wallet anywhere**.

Faithful build = two REAL 25B ledgers (real partition, like two accounts):
- **Book A (BAL 25B)**: real BA-v11 pkl signal + SV_TIGHT + overheat-AVOID, TIER_BAL tw10%, max12, hold45, stop−20%, DT5G parking {3:0.7} E1VFVN30, real fills (T+1 Open, slip, 20%ADV cap, 0.3%TC).
- **Book B (SWITCHED 25B, ONE ledger)**: sig_AH==1 → BA-v11 restricted top-30; ==0 → LAGGED earnings-surprise schedule (rebuilt exactly: NP_R≥15 & prior_n_good≥4 & pa_HL3≥5, T+5 entry, 25td hold, 10%/8% S2 sizing, no stop). **On each of 28 flips the outgoing mode's positions are SOLD FOR REAL at T+1 Open** (64 MODE_FLIP sells, 515B turnover) and the incoming mode rebuys from actual cash. Engine gained additive param `force_close_tiers_dates`.
- sig_AH reused from rscap CSV (point-in-time M1+M3r AND-HOLD, NAV-independent).

**RESULT (full 2014→2026-06, 50B):**
| | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe |
|---|---|---|---|
| V4 FAITHFUL (A+B) | **14.20%** | −22.2% | 1.10 |
| V4 FAITHFUL + CAPIT | **17.83% (+3.62pp)** | −23.1% | 1.20 |
| V4 recombined (ref) | 23.06% | −24.1% | 1.56 |
| VNINDEX B&H | 11.42% | −45.3% | 0.69 |

Reads:
1. **Honest V4 ≈ 14.2%/Sh1.10, NOT 23.1%/1.56** — idealization gap ≈ 8.9pp full-period (consistent with [[v5_prodspec_integrity_audit]] ~12pp finding). Still beats VNI with HALF the DD → the system's real value is risk-adjusted.
2. **Faithful is a LOWER bound on the switched leg**: as-built, after a flip the book waits for NEW signals (sparse V30 tier → sits in cash/ETF), whereas a real trader could replicate the incoming book's CURRENT target portfolio at flip. Recombined = costless instant teleport (upper). Truth in between; not yet quantified.
3. **CAPIT committed sleeve on this two-book host: +3.62pp** (14.20→17.83, Sh 1.10→1.20, DD ≈) — stronger than the single-book +2.66pp (two ledgers hold more total idle cash at washouts). Deployable capit range: **+2.5–3.6pp**, decaying with NAV (capacity, see [[capitulation-overlay-accounting-fix-2026]]).
4. Capacity again: BAL faithful at 25B = 14.42% vs at 50B = 12.85% (smaller book fills better).
5. Book B composition: LAG trades dominate (871 buys vs 93 V30 momentum buys) — in V11 mode the top-30-restricted BA-v11 signal is SPARSE, the faithful book parks ETF/cash; the recombined VN30 leg's continuous full investment is a big chunk of the gap.

**VARIANTS SHOWDOWN (`pt_v4_variants_faithful.py`, same framework, same Book A): FAITHFUL RANKING REVERSES — V2/V2.1 STATIC BEAT V4.**
| faithful system | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| V1 = BAL+VN30 static | 14.62% | −24.5 | 1.15 | 0.60 |
| V2 = BAL+LAGv12 static | 20.63% | **−19.9** | 1.57 | **1.04** |
| **V2.1 = BAL+LAGv12.1 static** | **21.23%** | −20.6 | **1.58** | 1.03 |
| V4 = BAL+SWITCHED | 14.20% | −22.2 | 1.10 | 0.64 |

Recombined ranking was V4(23.1) > V2(22.2) > V1(20.1) — faithful ranking is V2.1 > V2 >> V1 ≈ V4. Standalone books: LAG v12.1 alone **25.33%/Sh1.46** (LAG leg was ALWAYS an honest single-wallet sim in prodspec → reproduces nearly fully; V2 gap recombined→faithful only −1.6pp = BAL-side idealization). SWITCHED standalone 13.98%/Sh0.87 — **the ensemble switch DESTROYS ~10.5pp vs simply holding LAG**, because in real execution every flip to V11-mode liquidates LAG and then the top-30-restricted BA-v11 signal is SPARSE (93 buys/12y) → dead capital in ETF/cash; the recombined switch teleports into a continuously-compounding VN30 book instead. Same lesson as [[dt4_ensemble_smart_integration]] (re-validate on prod/faithful, never reduced harness) — extended: **the V121_ENS switch never survived a real ledger; V4's entire edge over V2 was recombination artifact**. Faithful-switch is a lower bound (waits for new signals post-flip), but it would need +7pp to catch V2.1 — implausible. **Honest champion = V2.1 (BAL + LAG v12.1, static, no switching): 21.23%/Sh1.58/DD−20.6** (+capit sleeve stacks on top). Caveat: LAG capacity at 25B fine, degrades at bigger NAV like everything else.

**LAG capacity curve (all-in test)**: LAG v12.1 standalone @25B 25.33%/Sh1.46/DD−29.4 → @50B **22.00%/Sh1.35/DD−28.5** → @100B 20.40%/Sh1.31. All-in 50B LAG vs V2.1 (BAL25+LAG25 21.23%/Sh1.58/DD−20.6): chỉ +0.77pp CAGR nhưng DD sâu hơn 8pp, Sharpe/Calmar tệ hơn rõ → **GIỮ combo V2.1, không all-in LAG**. Lý do cấu trúc: LAG avg-deployed chỉ ~40% (event-driven, 60% thời gian ngồi cash) → ghép BAL = tiền làm việc khi LAG nghỉ, diversification gần như miễn phí; cộng fragility 1-strategy (1 họ tín hiệu earnings-surprise, có thể decay) → Kelly-dưới-bất-định không cho all-in mean cao nhất.

**LAG × 8L event-study ([REDACTED]10)**: LAG selection = PURE earnings track-record (NP_R≥15 & prior_n_good≥4 & pa_HL3≥5, T+5 entry, 25td, 10/8% S2) — NO 8L, predates it. Bucketing 2,198 entries by 8L rating-at-entry: NOT monotonic — rating 2-3 best (+7.1/+6.8% fwd25td), rating 1 LOWER (+3.9%, blue-chip surprises priced fast), rating 5 worst (+3.3%/54%); q13 vs q45 chỉ +0.9pp, đảo chiều theo năm → **LAG filter đã tự chọn quality ngầm (4+ quý tốt hiếm khi là junk), 8L thêm rất ít** — tái xác nhận "event/momentum books RESIST FA overlays". NGOẠI LỆ đúng pattern regime_size: **BEAR × rating≥4 = −2.37%/win 33% (n=33)** (CRISIS thì KHÔNG hại, q45 +4.35 — khớp capitulation-junk-bounce). Action khả dĩ (đều nhỏ): skip/halve rating≥4 khi BEAR + loại rating 5 (n=80); KHÔNG gate cứng 8L (rating 4 = 634 entries +5.94% — cắt là phá book). data/fa_ratings_8l_hist.csv.

Files: pt_v4_full_faithful.py, pt_v4_variants_faithful.py, data/pt_v4_full_faithful_nav_{A,B,A_cap,B_cap}.csv, tx_B.csv, data/pt_v4_variants_*.csv. Engine additive params now: hold_days_by_tier, stop_exempt_tiers, slot_exempt_tiers, force_close_tiers_dates.

+- 🏦 **[V4 faithful + V2.1F champion ([REDACTED]10)](v4_faithful_reproduction_2026.md)** — Tái tạo V4 bằng 2 ledger 25B THẬT + flip bán-thật (64 MODE_FLIP/28 flips; cả pt_v4_dt5g live cũng switch ẢO). **V4 thật 14.20%/Sh1.10 vs recombined 23.06 (gap 8.9pp)**. SHOWDOWN: ranking ĐẢO — **V2.1=BAL+LAGv12.1 TĨNH >> V4** (switch ensemble PHÁ ~10.5pp vs cầm LAG tĩnh: flip→thanh lý LAG→V30 thưa→vốn chết); LAG riêng 25.3%/Sh1.46 nhưng all-in 50B tụt 22.0/Sh1.35/DD−28.5 → GIỮ combo. LAG×8L: filter đã quality-ngầm, 8L thêm ~0; BEAR×rating≥4 event-study xấu nhưng integrated −0.24pp → KHÔNG deploy. **CHỐT HỆ MỚI: V2.1+CAPIT = 23.86%/Sh1.71/Calmar1.15/DD−20.8 faithful** (≈ recombined V4 nhưng máu thật, DD nông hơn; capit +2.26pp). NEXT: paper-trade pt_v21 song song pt_v4_dt5g. pt_v4_full_faithful/variants/pt_v21_faithful.py.

- ⏳ **[ticker ingest lag → switch live scripts to ticker_1m ([REDACTED]09)](ticker_ingest_lag_ticker1m_switch.md)** — `ticker` nạp đêm ~22:30 (trễ 1 phiên cho script chạy 15:30/17:45/18:00); `ticker_1m` tươi ~16:40 nhưng KHÔNG có VNINDEX. Đã đổi latest-CTE→ticker_1m: vn30_8l/power_lens/recommend_lh/universe_scan (SWITCH) + unified_screener/dna_card/dna_report (HYBRID, giữ 52w-high trên ticker). Paper-trade trễ là CỐ Ý (cap today-1).

content.text:
Xong. Kết quả ablation đầy đủ — kèm một bất ngờ phải báo cáo trung thực:

## V2.1F ablation (faithful, 2 ledger 25B thật, 2014→nay)

| Hệ | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| V2.1 plain (BAL+LAG) | 21.60% | −20.5% | 1.59 | 1.05 |
| V2.1 + BEAR‑rule | 21.36% | −20.5% | 1.58 | 1.04 |
| **V2.1 + CAPIT ✅** | **23.86%** | −20.8% | **1.71** | **1.15** |
| V2.1F full (BEAR+CAPIT) | 23.73% | −20.8% | 1.70 | 1.14 |

## Hai kết luận

**1. CAPIT sleeve xếp chồng lên V2.1 đúng như kỳ vọng: +2.26pp, Sharpe 1.59→1.71, DD không đổi.** Sổ LAG (ngồi cash ~60% thời gian) đúng là host lý tưởng cho sleeve — tiền nhàn rỗi của nó được bơm vào rổ golden tại washout thay vì nằm không.

**2. BEAR‑rule — phải báo ngược với kỳ vọng: KHÔNG nên deploy.** Dù event‑study ủng hộ (BEAR×rating≥4 = −2.37%/win 33%), khi chạy **integrated** nó làm hệ *kém đi* −0.24pp với Sharpe/DD y nguyên. Lý do: chỉ 37 lệnh/12 năm bị ảnh hưởng, và phần size cắt đi nằm cash 0% thay vì làm việc — chi phí cơ hội nuốt sạch khoản lỗ tránh được. Đây là lần thứ N pattern này xuất hiện: *edge nhỏ ở tầng tín hiệu không sống sót qua tầng tích hợp* (regime_size chỉ thắng trên book BAL, không phải LAG). Tôi khuyến nghị bỏ rule này, giữ hệ gọn.

## Hệ chốt: V2.1 + CAPIT

**23.86% / MaxDD −20.8% / Sharpe 1.71 / Calmar 1.15** — toàn bộ bằng giao dịch thật. Điểm đáng chú ý nhất: con số faithful này **đạt lại đúng mức recombined V4 cũ (23.06%)** nhưng lần này là máu thật chứ không phải artifact ghép chân — và với **DD nông hơn 3.3pp** (−20.8 vs −24.1), Sharpe cao hơn hẳn (1.71 vs 1.56). So với V4 faithful + capit (17.83%) là +6pp. Kỳ vọng forward thực tế trừ phí/slippage: **~22%/năm**.

Một lưu ý kỹ thuật đã ghi memory: giữa các run khác nhau có noise thứ tự fill ~±0.5pp (các lệnh cùng ngày cùng ta tie‑break khác nhau) — vì vậy chỉ tin so sánh ablation *trong cùng một run* (bảng trên là vậy).

**Bước tiếp theo tự nhiên:** dựng `pt_v21_dt5g.py` — paper‑trade V2.1+CAPIT (BAL 25B + LAG 25B, không switch, sleeve capitulation theo playbook) chạy song song `pt_v4_dt5g.py` hằng ngày, để có bằng chứng forward trước khi quyết định xoay vốn từ V4 sang. Bạn muốn tôi dựng luôn không?

content.text:
Câu hỏi này đi thẳng vào kiến trúc — và trực giác của bạn trùng với hướng V6‑v3/sleeve‑budget‑allocator. Để tôi phân tích, rồi chạy luôn bài test quyết định cho vế thứ nhất (1 ví vs 2 sổ), vì nó rẻ và đo được ngay.

## Phân tích trước khi đo

**Vì sao 2 sổ tồn tại:** nó là di sản của kiến trúc prodspec (mỗi leg một sim độc lập rồi cộng NAV) — không phải một quyết định thiết kế có chủ đích. Chia cứng 25/25 có hai nhược điểm thật: (1) khi LAG vắng sự kiện (ngồi cash ~60% thời gian), nửa vốn đó không thể chảy sang cơ hội momentum và ngược lại; (2) hai sổ compound riêng → tỉ trọng trôi tự do theo sổ thắng (LAG phình to dần), không ai điều phối.

**Vế concentration (M1/M3r):** tín hiệu thì có thông tin thật (2025 VIC‑led grind đúng là kịch bản nó nhận diện), nhưng dùng nó làm **cú switch cứng** đã chết khi gặp ledger thật (−10.5pp: thanh lý cả sổ + tín hiệu V30 thưa = vốn chết). Cái fix tinh tế nằm ở chỗ này: **chân "VN30" không nên là 30 cổ phiếu — nó nên là chính E1VFVN30 mà ta đang dùng để park**. Khi đó tín hiệu concentration không switch sổ nữa mà chỉ **điều biến tỉ lệ park ETF** — flip ETF chỉ tốn ~0.15% friction trên phần cash nhàn rỗi, *bất đối xứng chi phí giết chết cú switch cũ biến mất hoàn toàn*. Đó chính là "bộ điều phối vốn" bạn mô tả.

Giờ đo vế 1: **một ví 50B** (momentum 5%/vị thế + LAG 5%/4% + capit sized trên cash thật duy nhất + parking {3:0.7}) vs hệ 2 sổ V2.1+CAPIT (23.86%/Sh1.71):

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
pt_onewallet_faithful.py — ONE 50B wallet: momentum + LAG + capit + ETF parking.\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Tests the user's architecture question: do we need two separate 25B books, or is
ONE ledger with sleeve weights better? Capital flows naturally: when LAG is idle
(no earnings events ~60% of time) its cash serves momentum/parking/capit, and
vice versa. Sleeve sizing keeps per-position VND comparable to the two-book setup
(mom 5% of 50B NAV ~= 10% of 25B; LAG 5%/4% ~= 10%/8% of 25B).
  Sleeve 1 MOMENTUM: BA-v11 TIER_BAL, w=0.05/name
  Sleeve 2 LAG     : earnings schedule, w=0.05/0.04, 25td, no stop, cap 8+8
  Sleeve 3 CAPIT   : committed playbook sleeve, sized on the wallet's true idle cash
  Sleeve 4 PARKING : idle cash -> E1VFVN30 in NEUTRAL {3:0.7} (same as V4 spec)
Compare vs two-book V2.1+CAPIT (23.86%/Sh1.71/DD-20.8 faithful).
Run: python pt_onewallet_faithful.py
"""
import sys, os, pickle
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
import simulate_holistic_nav as shn
from simulate_holistic_nav import simulate

W = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
INIT = 50_000_000_000
TIER_BAL = ["MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY"]
BUY_TIERS = {"MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","MOMENTUM_QUALITY",
             "MOMENTUM_A","MOMENTUM_S_N","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY","COMPOUNDER_BUY","S_PRO"}
EVENTS = [("2014-05-08",1,False),("2015-08-24",3,False),("2016-01-18",3,True),
          ("2018-05-28",1,False),("2020-03-12",2,False),
          ("2022-04-20",1,False),("2022-06-20",2,True),("2022-09-29",2,True),
          ("2023-10-31",1,False),("2024-04-19",4,False),("2025-04-03",4,False),
          ("2026-03-09",3,False)]
def size_of(state, grind):
    return (1.0 if state == 1 else 0.5) * (0.5 if grind else 1.0)

print("[1] Loading...")
panel = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","v4f_panel_2014.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vni_dates = sorted(panel["time"].unique())
prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"])) for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
opens  = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Open"]))  for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
liqlk  = {(r.ticker, r.time): r.liq_adv for r in panel.itertuples()}
dtg = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","daily_comovement_dt5g.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
state_by_date = {t: int(s) for t, s in zip(dtg["time"], dtg["state"])}
last_st=None
for d in vni_dates:
    if d in state_by_date: last_st=state_by_date[d]
    elif last_st is not None: state_by_date[d]=last_st
vnx = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"VNINDEX.csv"), usecols=["time","Close","MA200","D_RSI"], parse_dates=["time"])
vnx = vnx[vnx["time"] >= panel["time"].min()]
etf = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","e1vfvn30_daily.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vn30_und = pd.Series(etf["Close"].values, index=etf["time"])

# momentum signal (same construction as all faithful runs)
sig_b = pickle.load(open(os.path.join(W,"ba_v11_unified_12y_sig.pkl"),"rb"))
sig_b["time"] = pd.to_datetime(sig_b["time"])
sig_b = sig_b[sig_b["time"] >= panel["time"].min()].copy()
def sv_tight_keep(row):
    s, days = row["state5"], row["days_since_release"]
    if pd.isna(s): return True
    s = int(s)
    if s in (4,5): return True
    if s == 1: return pd.notna(days) and days <= 30
    if s in (2,3): return pd.notna(days) and days <= 60
    return True
mb = sig_b["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS)
sig_b = sig_b[(~mb) | sig_b.apply(sv_tight_keep, axis=1)].copy()
v = vnx.merge(pd.DataFrame({"time": list(state_by_date.keys()), "st": list(state_by_date.values())}), on="time", how="left")
v["st"]=v["st"].ffill()
oh = set(v[(v["Close"]/v["MA200"]>1.30)&((v["st"]==5)|(v["D_RSI"]>0.75))]["time"])
sig_b.loc[sig_b["time"].isin(oh) & sig_b["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS), "play_type"]="AVOID_overheated"
sec_map = sig_b.dropna(subset=["sec"]).drop_duplicates("ticker").set_index("ticker")["sec"].to_dict()
sig_mom = sig_b[["time","ticker","play_type","ta","Close"]].copy()

# LAG schedule
with open(os.path.join(W,"earnings_surprise_data.pkl"),"rb") as f: fin = pickle.load(f)
fin["Release_Date"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]); FLOOR=1e9
fin["exp_B_MA"]=fin[["NP_P1","NP_P2","NP_P3","NP_P4"]].mean(axis=1)
fin["surprise_B_MA"]=((fin["NP_P0"]-fin["exp_B_MA"])/np.maximum(np.abs(fin["exp_B_MA"]),FLOOR)).clip(-5,5)
ev_class=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"earnings_events_classified.csv"),parse_dates=["Release_Date"])
ev=ev_class.merge(fin[["ticker","quarter","Release_Date","surprise_B_MA"]],on=["ticker","quarter","Release_Date"],how="left")
ev=ev.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).reset_index(drop=True); ev["surprise_B_MA"]=ev["surprise_B_MA"].fillna(0)
LN2=np.log(2); HL=3.0; ev["prior_n_good"]=0; ev["pa_HL3"]=np.nan
for tk,g in ev.groupby("ticker"):
    hist=[]
    for ri in g.index.tolist():
        row=ev.loc[ri]; cur=row["Release_Date"]; ev.at[ri,"prior_n_good"]=len(hist)
        if hist:
            da=pd.to_datetime([d for d,_ in hist]); pa=np.array([p for _,p in hist])
            wts=np.exp(-LN2*((cur-da).days.values/365.25)/HL)
            ev.at[ri,"pa_HL3"]=(pa*wts).sum()/wts.sum() if wts.sum()>0 else np.nan
        if pd.notna(row["NP_R"]) and row["NP_R"]>=15 and pd.notna(row["post_ret"]): hist.append((cur,row["post_ret"]))
e_hl3=ev[(ev["NP_R"]>=15)&(ev["prior_n_good"]>=4)&(ev["pa_HL3"]>=5)].copy()
arr=np.array(vni_dates,dtype="datetime64[ns]")
def offd(ref,off):
    pos=np.searchsorted(arr,np.datetime64(ref),side="right")-1; t=pos+off
    return pd.Timestamp(arr[t]) if 0<=t<len(arr) else None
rows=[]
for _,row in e_hl3.iterrows():
    tk=row["ticker"]; entry=offd(row["Release_Date"],5)
    if entry is None or tk not in prices: continue
    sd=offd(entry,-1)
    if sd is None or sd not in prices[tk]: continue
    rows.append({"time":sd,"ticker":tk,"play_type":"LAG_HI" if row["surprise_B_MA"]>0.5 else "LAG_LO",
                 "ta":400.0,"Close":prices[tk][sd]})
sig_lag=pd.DataFrame(rows)
shn.TIER_PRIORITY.update({"LAG_HI":88,"LAG_LO":82})

# one-wallet sleeve weights: per-position VND comparable to two-book setup
TW = {**{t:0.05 for t in TIER_BAL}, "LAG_HI":0.05, "LAG_LO":0.04}
TIERS = TIER_BAL + ["LAG_HI","LAG_LO"]
sig_all = pd.concat([sig_mom, sig_lag], ignore_index=True)

LIQ = dict(liquidity_volume_pct=0.20, max_fill_days=5, liquidity_lookup=liqlk, exit_slippage_tiered=True)
COMMON = dict(max_positions=24, min_hold=2, slippage=0.001, init_nav=INIT,
              hold_days=45, stop_loss=-0.20,
              sector_limit_per_sector={8:4}, ticker_sector_map=sec_map,
              sector_cap_exempt_tiers={"RE_BACKLOG_BUY"},
              deposit_annual=0.0, borrow_annual=0.10, state_by_date=state_by_date,
              cash_etf_states={3:0.7}, vn30_underlying=vn30_und,
              etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0, etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0, etf_rebalance_friction=0.0015,
              open_prices=opens, t1_open_exec=True, **LIQ)
LAGX = dict(hold_days_by_tier={"LAG_HI":25,"LAG_LO":25},
            stop_exempt_tiers={"LAG_HI","LAG_LO"},
            tier_position_limit={"LAG_HI":8,"LAG_LO":8})

def run(sig, tiers, label, tw, extra):
    nav,_=simulate(sig,prices,vni_dates,allowed_tiers=tiers,tier_weights=tw,name=label,**COMMON,**extra)
    nav["time"]=pd.to_datetime(nav["time"]); return nav
def metrics(s):
    s=s.dropna(); r=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1; dd=(s/s.cummax()-1).min(); sh=r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    return cagr*100, dd*100, sh, (cagr/abs(dd) if dd<0 else 0)

print("[2] ONE-WALLET base (mom + LAG + parking)...")
nav1 = run(sig_all, TIERS, "OW_base", TW, LAGX)
s1=nav1.set_index("time")["nav"]; c1,d1,sh1,cal1=metrics(s1)
print(f"    base: CAGR {c1:.2f}%  MaxDD {d1:.1f}%  Sharpe {sh1:.2f}")

print("[3] + CAPIT (sized on the wallet's true idle cash)...")
elig=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","capit_event_elig_full.csv"),parse_dates=["event"])
basecash=nav1.set_index("time")["cash_pct"]/100.0
rows2,tw2,ct=[],dict(TW),[]
for i,(ds,st,gr) in enumerate(EVENTS):
    d=pd.Timestamp(ds); e=elig[elig["event"]==d].copy()
    e=e[[t in prices and d in prices[t] for t in e["ticker"]]]
    g=e[e["pbz"]<-1]; c=e[e["pbz"]<0]
    pick=g if len(g)>=3 else (c if len(c)>=3 else e)
    pick=pick.nsmallest(15,"pbz") if len(pick)>15 else pick
    names=list(pick["ticker"])
    if len(names)<3: continue
    pos=basecash.index.searchsorted(d); cf=float(basecash.iloc[max(0,pos-2):pos+1].mean())
    wt=size_of(st,gr)*max(cf,0.0)
    if wt<=0.005: continue
    pt=f"CAPIT_E{i}"; shn.TIER_PRIORITY[pt]=95
    tw2[pt]=wt/len(names); ct.append(pt)
    for t in names: rows2.append({"time":d,"ticker":t,"play_type":pt,"ta":500.0,"Close":prices[t][d]})
sig2=pd.concat([sig_all,pd.DataFrame(rows2)],ignore_index=True)
EX2=dict(hold_days_by_tier={**LAGX["hold_days_by_tier"], **{t:60 for t in ct}},
         stop_exempt_tiers=LAGX["stop_exempt_tiers"]|set(ct),
         slot_exempt_tiers=set(ct),
         tier_position_limit={**LAGX["tier_position_limit"], **{t:15 for t in ct}})
nav2 = run(sig2, TIERS+ct, "OW_capit", tw2, EX2)
s2=nav2.set_index("time")["nav"]; c2,d2,sh2,cal2=metrics(s2)

print("\n"+"="*92)
print("ONE WALLET vs TWO BOOKS (faithful, 50B, 2014 -> now)")
print("="*92)
print(f"  {'architecture':<38}{'CAGR':>8}{'MaxDD':>9}{'Sharpe':>8}{'Calmar':>8}")
print(f"  {'ONE-WALLET base (mom+LAG+park)':<38}{c1:>7.2f}%{d1:>8.1f}%{sh1:>8.2f}{cal1:>8.2f}")
print(f"  {'ONE-WALLET + CAPIT':<38}{c2:>7.2f}%{d2:>8.1f}%{sh2:>8.2f}{cal2:>8.2f}")
print(f"  {'TWO-BOOK V2.1 plain (ref)':<38}{'21.60%':>8}{'-20.5%':>9}{'1.59':>8}{'1.05':>8}")
print(f"  {'TWO-BOOK V2.1+CAPIT (ref)':<38}{'23.86%':>8}{'-20.8%':>9}{'1.71':>8}{'1.15':>8}")
dep=nav1.set_index("time")[["cash_pct","cash_etf_pct","deployed_pct"]]
print(f"\n  one-wallet base avg: cash {dep['cash_pct'].mean():.0f}%  etf {dep['cash_etf_pct'].mean():.0f}%  deployed {dep['deployed_pct'].mean():.0f}%")
nav1.to_csv(os.path.join(W,"data/pt_onewallet_base.csv"),index=False)
nav2.to_csv(os.path.join(W,"data/pt_onewallet_capit.csv"),index=False)
print("  Saved: data/pt_onewallet_{base,capit}.csv")

toolUseResult.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
pt_onewallet_faithful.py — ONE 50B wallet: momentum + LAG + capit + ETF parking.\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Tests the user's architecture question: do we need two separate 25B books, or is
ONE ledger with sleeve weights better? Capital flows naturally: when LAG is idle
(no earnings events ~60% of time) its cash serves momentum/parking/capit, and
vice versa. Sleeve sizing keeps per-position VND comparable to the two-book setup
(mom 5% of 50B NAV ~= 10% of 25B; LAG 5%/4% ~= 10%/8% of 25B).
  Sleeve 1 MOMENTUM: BA-v11 TIER_BAL, w=0.05/name
  Sleeve 2 LAG     : earnings schedule, w=0.05/0.04, 25td, no stop, cap 8+8
  Sleeve 3 CAPIT   : committed playbook sleeve, sized on the wallet's true idle cash
  Sleeve 4 PARKING : idle cash -> E1VFVN30 in NEUTRAL {3:0.7} (same as V4 spec)
Compare vs two-book V2.1+CAPIT (23.86%/Sh1.71/DD-20.8 faithful).
Run: python pt_onewallet_faithful.py
"""
import sys, os, pickle
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
import simulate_holistic_nav as shn
from simulate_holistic_nav import simulate

W = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
INIT = 50_000_000_000
TIER_BAL = ["MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY"]
BUY_TIERS = {"MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","MOMENTUM_QUALITY",
             "MOMENTUM_A","MOMENTUM_S_N","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY","COMPOUNDER_BUY","S_PRO"}
EVENTS = [("2014-05-08",1,False),("2015-08-24",3,False),("2016-01-18",3,True),
          ("2018-05-28",1,False),("2020-03-12",2,False),
          ("2022-04-20",1,False),("2022-06-20",2,True),("2022-09-29",2,True),
          ("2023-10-31",1,False),("2024-04-19",4,False),("2025-04-03",4,False),
          ("2026-03-09",3,False)]
def size_of(state, grind):
    return (1.0 if state == 1 else 0.5) * (0.5 if grind else 1.0)

print("[1] Loading...")
panel = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","v4f_panel_2014.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vni_dates = sorted(panel["time"].unique())
prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"])) for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
opens  = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Open"]))  for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
liqlk  = {(r.ticker, r.time): r.liq_adv for r in panel.itertuples()}
dtg = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","daily_comovement_dt5g.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
state_by_date = {t: int(s) for t, s in zip(dtg["time"], dtg["state"])}
last_st=None
for d in vni_dates:
    if d in state_by_date: last_st=state_by_date[d]
    elif last_st is not None: state_by_date[d]=last_st
vnx = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"VNINDEX.csv"), usecols=["time","Close","MA200","D_RSI"], parse_dates=["time"])
vnx = vnx[vnx["time"] >= panel["time"].min()]
etf = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","e1vfvn30_daily.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vn30_und = pd.Series(etf["Close"].values, index=etf["time"])

# momentum signal (same construction as all faithful runs)
sig_b = pickle.load(open(os.path.join(W,"ba_v11_unified_12y_sig.pkl"),"rb"))
sig_b["time"] = pd.to_datetime(sig_b["time"])
sig_b = sig_b[sig_b["time"] >= panel["time"].min()].copy()
def sv_tight_keep(row):
    s, days = row["state5"], row["days_since_release"]
    if pd.isna(s): return True
    s = int(s)
    if s in (4,5): return True
    if s == 1: return pd.notna(days) and days <= 30
    if s in (2,3): return pd.notna(days) and days <= 60
    return True
mb = sig_b["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS)
sig_b = sig_b[(~mb) | sig_b.apply(sv_tight_keep, axis=1)].copy()
v = vnx.merge(pd.DataFrame({"time": list(state_by_date.keys()), "st": list(state_by_date.values())}), on="time", how="left")
v["st"]=v["st"].ffill()
oh = set(v[(v["Close"]/v["MA200"]>1.30)&((v["st"]==5)|(v["D_RSI"]>0.75))]["time"])
sig_b.loc[sig_b["time"].isin(oh) & sig_b["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS), "play_type"]="AVOID_overheated"
sec_map = sig_b.dropna(subset=["sec"]).drop_duplicates("ticker").set_index("ticker")["sec"].to_dict()
sig_mom = sig_b[["time","ticker","play_type","ta","Close"]].copy()

# LAG schedule
with open(os.path.join(W,"earnings_surprise_data.pkl"),"rb") as f: fin = pickle.load(f)
fin["Release_Date"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]); FLOOR=1e9
fin["exp_B_MA"]=fin[["NP_P1","NP_P2","NP_P3","NP_P4"]].mean(axis=1)
fin["surprise_B_MA"]=((fin["NP_P0"]-fin["exp_B_MA"])/np.maximum(np.abs(fin["exp_B_MA"]),FLOOR)).clip(-5,5)
ev_class=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"earnings_events_classified.csv"),parse_dates=["Release_Date"])
ev=ev_class.merge(fin[["ticker","quarter","Release_Date","surprise_B_MA"]],on=["ticker","quarter","Release_Date"],how="left")
ev=ev.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).reset_index(drop=True); ev["surprise_B_MA"]=ev["surprise_B_MA"].fillna(0)
LN2=np.log(2); HL=3.0; ev["prior_n_good"]=0; ev["pa_HL3"]=np.nan
for tk,g in ev.groupby("ticker"):
    hist=[]
    for ri in g.index.tolist():
        row=ev.loc[ri]; cur=row["Release_Date"]; ev.at[ri,"prior_n_good"]=len(hist)
        if hist:
            da=pd.to_datetime([d for d,_ in hist]); pa=np.array([p for _,p in hist])
            wts=np.exp(-LN2*((cur-da).days.values/365.25)/HL)
            ev.at[ri,"pa_HL3"]=(pa*wts).sum()/wts.sum() if wts.sum()>0 else np.nan
        if pd.notna(row["NP_R"]) and row["NP_R"]>=15 and pd.notna(row["post_ret"]): hist.append((cur,row["post_ret"]))
e_hl3=ev[(ev["NP_R"]>=15)&(ev["prior_n_good"]>=4)&(ev["pa_HL3"]>=5)].copy()
arr=np.array(vni_dates,dtype="datetime64[ns]")
def offd(ref,off):
    pos=np.searchsorted(arr,np.datetime64(ref),side="right")-1; t=pos+off
    return pd.Timestamp(arr[t]) if 0<=t<len(arr) else None
rows=[]
for _,row in e_hl3.iterrows():
    tk=row["ticker"]; entry=offd(row["Release_Date"],5)
    if entry is None or tk not in prices: continue
    sd=offd(entry,-1)
    if sd is None or sd not in prices[tk]: continue
    rows.append({"time":sd,"ticker":tk,"play_type":"LAG_HI" if row["surprise_B_MA"]>0.5 else "LAG_LO",
                 "ta":400.0,"Close":prices[tk][sd]})
sig_lag=pd.DataFrame(rows)
shn.TIER_PRIORITY.update({"LAG_HI":88,"LAG_LO":82})

# one-wallet sleeve weights: per-position VND comparable to two-book setup
TW = {**{t:0.05 for t in TIER_BAL}, "LAG_HI":0.05, "LAG_LO":0.04}
TIERS = TIER_BAL + ["LAG_HI","LAG_LO"]
sig_all = pd.concat([sig_mom, sig_lag], ignore_index=True)

LIQ = dict(liquidity_volume_pct=0.20, max_fill_days=5, liquidity_lookup=liqlk, exit_slippage_tiered=True)
COMMON = dict(max_positions=24, min_hold=2, slippage=0.001, init_nav=INIT,
              hold_days=45, stop_loss=-0.20,
              sector_limit_per_sector={8:4}, ticker_sector_map=sec_map,
              sector_cap_exempt_tiers={"RE_BACKLOG_BUY"},
              deposit_annual=0.0, borrow_annual=0.10, state_by_date=state_by_date,
              cash_etf_states={3:0.7}, vn30_underlying=vn30_und,
              etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0, etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0, etf_rebalance_friction=0.0015,
              open_prices=opens, t1_open_exec=True, **LIQ)
LAGX = dict(hold_days_by_tier={"LAG_HI":25,"LAG_LO":25},
            stop_exempt_tiers={"LAG_HI","LAG_LO"},
            tier_position_limit={"LAG_HI":8,"LAG_LO":8})

def run(sig, tiers, label, tw, extra):
    nav,_=simulate(sig,prices,vni_dates,allowed_tiers=tiers,tier_weights=tw,name=label,**COMMON,**extra)
    nav["time"]=pd.to_datetime(nav["time"]); return nav
def metrics(s):
    s=s.dropna(); r=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1; dd=(s/s.cummax()-1).min(); sh=r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    return cagr*100, dd*100, sh, (cagr/abs(dd) if dd<0 else 0)

print("[2] ONE-WALLET base (mom + LAG + parking)...")
nav1 = run(sig_all, TIERS, "OW_base", TW, LAGX)
s1=nav1.set_index("time")["nav"]; c1,d1,sh1,cal1=metrics(s1)
print(f"    base: CAGR {c1:.2f}%  MaxDD {d1:.1f}%  Sharpe {sh1:.2f}")

print("[3] + CAPIT (sized on the wallet's true idle cash)...")
elig=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","capit_event_elig_full.csv"),parse_dates=["event"])
basecash=nav1.set_index("time")["cash_pct"]/100.0
rows2,tw2,ct=[],dict(TW),[]
for i,(ds,st,gr) in enumerate(EVENTS):
    d=pd.Timestamp(ds); e=elig[elig["event"]==d].copy()
    e=e[[t in prices and d in prices[t] for t in e["ticker"]]]
    g=e[e["pbz"]<-1]; c=e[e["pbz"]<0]
    pick=g if len(g)>=3 else (c if len(c)>=3 else e)
    pick=pick.nsmallest(15,"pbz") if len(pick)>15 else pick
    names=list(pick["ticker"])
    if len(names)<3: continue
    pos=basecash.index.searchsorted(d); cf=float(basecash.iloc[max(0,pos-2):pos+1].mean())
    wt=size_of(st,gr)*max(cf,0.0)
    if wt<=0.005: continue
    pt=f"CAPIT_E{i}"; shn.TIER_PRIORITY[pt]=95
    tw2[pt]=wt/len(names); ct.append(pt)
    for t in names: rows2.append({"time":d,"ticker":t,"play_type":pt,"ta":500.0,"Close":prices[t][d]})
sig2=pd.concat([sig_all,pd.DataFrame(rows2)],ignore_index=True)
EX2=dict(hold_days_by_tier={**LAGX["hold_days_by_tier"], **{t:60 for t in ct}},
         stop_exempt_tiers=LAGX["stop_exempt_tiers"]|set(ct),
         slot_exempt_tiers=set(ct),
         tier_position_limit={**LAGX["tier_position_limit"], **{t:15 for t in ct}})
nav2 = run(sig2, TIERS+ct, "OW_capit", tw2, EX2)
s2=nav2.set_index("time")["nav"]; c2,d2,sh2,cal2=metrics(s2)

print("\n"+"="*92)
print("ONE WALLET vs TWO BOOKS (faithful, 50B, 2014 -> now)")
print("="*92)
print(f"  {'architecture':<38}{'CAGR':>8}{'MaxDD':>9}{'Sharpe':>8}{'Calmar':>8}")
print(f"  {'ONE-WALLET base (mom+LAG+park)':<38}{c1:>7.2f}%{d1:>8.1f}%{sh1:>8.2f}{cal1:>8.2f}")
print(f"  {'ONE-WALLET + CAPIT':<38}{c2:>7.2f}%{d2:>8.1f}%{sh2:>8.2f}{cal2:>8.2f}")
print(f"  {'TWO-BOOK V2.1 plain (ref)':<38}{'21.60%':>8}{'-20.5%':>9}{'1.59':>8}{'1.05':>8}")
print(f"  {'TWO-BOOK V2.1+CAPIT (ref)':<38}{'23.86%':>8}{'-20.8%':>9}{'1.71':>8}{'1.15':>8}")
dep=nav1.set_index("time")[["cash_pct","cash_etf_pct","deployed_pct"]]
print(f"\n  one-wallet base avg: cash {dep['cash_pct'].mean():.0f}%  etf {dep['cash_etf_pct'].mean():.0f}%  deployed {dep['deployed_pct'].mean():.0f}%")
nav1.to_csv(os.path.join(W,"data/pt_onewallet_base.csv"),index=False)
nav2.to_csv(os.path.join(W,"data/pt_onewallet_capit.csv"),index=False)
print("  Saved: data/pt_onewallet_{base,capit}.csv")

content.text:
Test 1‑ví đang chạy nền (~5 phút). Trong lúc đó, phác thiết kế cho vế 2 — **bộ điều phối vốn** thay cú switch:

**Kiến trúc đề xuất (nếu test 1‑ví đạt):** một ví 50B, 4 sleeve, một bộ điều phối ngân sách:
1. **MOMENTUM** (BA‑v11) — ngân sách điều biến theo DT5G (như hiện tại, qua tier weights + AVOID_bear)
2. **LAG** (earnings) — chạy quanh năm theo lịch BCTC, không cần state‑gate (đã chứng minh tự phòng thủ)
3. **CAPIT** — committed carve trên *một* pool cash thật duy nhất (sạch hơn hẳn việc chia đôi như hiện nay)
4. **PARKING E1VFVN30** — đây là chỗ tín hiệu concentration M1/M3r tái sinh: thay vì switch sổ (chi phí thanh lý cả book — đã chết −10.5pp), nó chỉ **điều biến tỉ lệ park**: concentration cao (thị trường bị vài mã lớn kéo, EW momentum chảy máu) → park nhiều idle cash hơn vào ETF kể cả trong BULL → ăn được sóng megacap mà không cần chọn mã; concentration thấp → giảm park, nhường cash cho stock‑picking. Chi phí flip = 0.15% friction trên phần cash — rẻ hơn ~30 lần so với đảo cả sổ cổ phiếu, nên **bất đối xứng chi phí từng giết V4‑switch biến mất**.

Đây đúng tinh thần V6‑v3/sleeve‑budget‑allocator: điều phối **ngân sách**, không bao giờ điều phối bằng cách **đập sổ**. Chờ kết quả test để có số cụ thể cho vế 1.

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
pt_orchestrator_test.py — concentration signal reborn as a PARKING ALLOCATOR.\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
The V4 ensemble switch died on a real ledger (liquidate whole book -> dead capital).
The signal (M1+M3r AND-HOLD: market dominated by a few megacaps) may still have
value if it only modulates the CHEAP lever: how much idle cash parks in E1VFVN30.
Flip cost = 0.15% friction on idle cash, ~30x cheaper than flipping a stock book
-> the cost asymmetry that killed the switch disappears.

Arms (two-real-25B-ledger V2.1 frame, all faithful):
  A. V2.1 ref                    : BAL parks {3:0.7}, LAG no parking   (have: 21.60%)
  B. + LAG parking               : LAG book also parks {3:0.7}
  C. + CONC-tilt (on top of B)   : on sig_AH==1 (concentrated) days both books use
       {3:1.0, 4:1.0, 5:0.8} — park ALL idle in ETF through NEUTRAL/BULL;
       on sig_AH==0 days fall back to base {3:0.7}.
Then +CAPIT on the winner. Compare vs V2.1+CAPIT 23.86%/Sh1.71.
Run: python pt_orchestrator_test.py
"""
import sys, os, pickle
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
import simulate_holistic_nav as shn
from simulate_holistic_nav import simulate

W = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
BOOK = 25_000_000_000
TIER_BAL = ["MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY"]
TIER_WEIGHTS = {t: 0.10 for t in TIER_BAL}
BUY_TIERS = {"MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","MOMENTUM_QUALITY",
             "MOMENTUM_A","MOMENTUM_S_N","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY","COMPOUNDER_BUY","S_PRO"}
EVENTS = [("2014-05-08",1,False),("2015-08-24",3,False),("2016-01-18",3,True),
          ("2018-05-28",1,False),("2020-03-12",2,False),
          ("2022-04-20",1,False),("2022-06-20",2,True),("2022-09-29",2,True),
          ("2023-10-31",1,False),("2024-04-19",4,False),("2025-04-03",4,False),
          ("2026-03-09",3,False)]
def size_of(state, grind):
    return (1.0 if state == 1 else 0.5) * (0.5 if grind else 1.0)

print("[1] Loading...")
panel = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","v4f_panel_2014.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vni_dates = sorted(panel["time"].unique())
prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"])) for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
opens  = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Open"]))  for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
liqlk  = {(r.ticker, r.time): r.liq_adv for r in panel.itertuples()}
dtg = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","daily_comovement_dt5g.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
state_by_date = {t: int(s) for t, s in zip(dtg["time"], dtg["state"])}
last_st=None
for d in vni_dates:
    if d in state_by_date: last_st=state_by_date[d]
    elif last_st is not None: state_by_date[d]=last_st
vnx = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"VNINDEX.csv"), usecols=["time","Close","MA200","D_RSI"], parse_dates=["time"])
vnx = vnx[vnx["time"] >= panel["time"].min()]
etf = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","e1vfvn30_daily.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vn30_und = pd.Series(etf["Close"].values, index=etf["time"])
rc = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","5sys_prodspec_201401_202605_dt5g_rscap.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
sigAH = pd.Series(rc["sig_AH"].values, index=rc["time"]).reindex(pd.Index(vni_dates)).ffill().fillna(1).astype(int)
CONC_MAP = {1:0.0, 2:0.0, 3:1.0, 4:1.0, 5:0.8}
conc_by_date = {d: CONC_MAP for d in vni_dates if int(sigAH.loc[d]) == 1}
print(f"    concentrated days: {len(conc_by_date)}/{len(vni_dates)}")

sig_b = pickle.load(open(os.path.join(W,"ba_v11_unified_12y_sig.pkl"),"rb"))
sig_b["time"] = pd.to_datetime(sig_b["time"])
sig_b = sig_b[sig_b["time"] >= panel["time"].min()].copy()
def sv_tight_keep(row):
    s, days = row["state5"], row["days_since_release"]
    if pd.isna(s): return True
    s = int(s)
    if s in (4,5): return True
    if s == 1: return pd.notna(days) and days <= 30
    if s in (2,3): return pd.notna(days) and days <= 60
    return True
mb = sig_b["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS)
sig_b = sig_b[(~mb) | sig_b.apply(sv_tight_keep, axis=1)].copy()
v = vnx.merge(pd.DataFrame({"time": list(state_by_date.keys()), "st": list(state_by_date.values())}), on="time", how="left")
v["st"]=v["st"].ffill()
oh = set(v[(v["Close"]/v["MA200"]>1.30)&((v["st"]==5)|(v["D_RSI"]>0.75))]["time"])
sig_b.loc[sig_b["time"].isin(oh) & sig_b["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS), "play_type"]="AVOID_overheated"
sec_map = sig_b.dropna(subset=["sec"]).drop_duplicates("ticker").set_index("ticker")["sec"].to_dict()
sig_mom = sig_b[["time","ticker","play_type","ta","Close"]].copy()

with open(os.path.join(W,"earnings_surprise_data.pkl"),"rb") as f: fin = pickle.load(f)
fin["Release_Date"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]); FLOOR=1e9
fin["exp_B_MA"]=fin[["NP_P1","NP_P2","NP_P3","NP_P4"]].mean(axis=1)
fin["surprise_B_MA"]=((fin["NP_P0"]-fin["exp_B_MA"])/np.maximum(np.abs(fin["exp_B_MA"]),FLOOR)).clip(-5,5)
ev_class=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"earnings_events_classified.csv"),parse_dates=["Release_Date"])
ev=ev_class.merge(fin[["ticker","quarter","Release_Date","surprise_B_MA"]],on=["ticker","quarter","Release_Date"],how="left")
ev=ev.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).reset_index(drop=True); ev["surprise_B_MA"]=ev["surprise_B_MA"].fillna(0)
LN2=np.log(2); HL=3.0; ev["prior_n_good"]=0; ev["pa_HL3"]=np.nan
for tk,g in ev.groupby("ticker"):
    hist=[]
    for ri in g.index.tolist():
        row=ev.loc[ri]; cur=row["Release_Date"]; ev.at[ri,"prior_n_good"]=len(hist)
        if hist:
            da=pd.to_datetime([d for d,_ in hist]); pa=np.array([p for _,p in hist])
            wts=np.exp(-LN2*((cur-da).days.values/365.25)/HL)
            ev.at[ri,"pa_HL3"]=(pa*wts).sum()/wts.sum() if wts.sum()>0 else np.nan
        if pd.notna(row["NP_R"]) and row["NP_R"]>=15 and pd.notna(row["post_ret"]): hist.append((cur,row["post_ret"]))
e_hl3=ev[(ev["NP_R"]>=15)&(ev["prior_n_good"]>=4)&(ev["pa_HL3"]>=5)].copy()
arr=np.array(vni_dates,dtype="datetime64[ns]")
def offd(ref,off):
    pos=np.searchsorted(arr,np.datetime64(ref),side="right")-1; t=pos+off
    return pd.Timestamp(arr[t]) if 0<=t<len(arr) else None
rows=[]
for _,row in e_hl3.iterrows():
    tk=row["ticker"]; entry=offd(row["Release_Date"],5)
    if entry is None or tk not in prices: continue
    sd=offd(entry,-1)
    if sd is None or sd not in prices[tk]: continue
    rows.append({"time":sd,"ticker":tk,"play_type":"LAG_HI" if row["surprise_B_MA"]>0.5 else "LAG_LO",
                 "ta":400.0,"Close":prices[tk][sd]})
sig_lag=pd.DataFrame(rows)
shn.TIER_PRIORITY.update({"LAG_HI":88,"LAG_LO":82})
LAG_TW={"LAG_HI":0.10,"LAG_LO":0.08}

LIQ = dict(liquidity_volume_pct=0.20, max_fill_days=5, liquidity_lookup=liqlk, exit_slippage_tiered=True)
BASE_KW = dict(max_positions=12, min_hold=2, slippage=0.001, init_nav=BOOK,
               deposit_annual=0.0, borrow_annual=0.10, state_by_date=state_by_date,
               open_prices=opens, t1_open_exec=True, **LIQ)
ETF_KW = dict(vn30_underlying=vn30_und, etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0,
              etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0, etf_rebalance_friction=0.0015)

def run_bal(label, conc=False):
    kw=dict(hold_days=45, stop_loss=-0.20, sector_limit_per_sector={8:4},
            ticker_sector_map=sec_map, sector_cap_exempt_tiers={"RE_BACKLOG_BUY"},
            cash_etf_states={3:0.7}, **ETF_KW)
    if conc: kw["cash_etf_states_by_date"]=conc_by_date
    nav,_=simulate(sig_mom,prices,vni_dates,allowed_tiers=TIER_BAL,tier_weights=TIER_WEIGHTS,
                   name=label,**BASE_KW,**kw)
    nav["time"]=pd.to_datetime(nav["time"]); return nav

def run_lag(sig, tw, label, park=False, conc=False, extra=None):
    lagts={t for t in set(sig["play_type"]) if t.startswith("LAG")}
    kw=dict(hold_days=25, stop_loss=-0.99,
            stop_exempt_tiers=lagts | set((extra or {}).get("stop_exempt_tiers",set())),
            hold_days_by_tier={**{t:25 for t in lagts}, **(extra or {}).get("hold_days_by_tier",{})},
            tier_position_limit={**{t:12 for t in lagts}, **(extra or {}).get("tier_position_limit",{})})
    if extra and "slot_exempt_tiers" in extra: kw["slot_exempt_tiers"]=extra["slot_exempt_tiers"]
    if park:
        kw.update(cash_etf_states={3:0.7}, **ETF_KW)
        if conc: kw["cash_etf_states_by_date"]=conc_by_date
    nav,_=simulate(sig,prices,vni_dates,allowed_tiers=sorted(set(sig["play_type"])),tier_weights=tw,
                   name=label,**BASE_KW,**kw)
    nav["time"]=pd.to_datetime(nav["time"]); return nav

def add_capit(sig, navlog, tw, tag):
    elig=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","capit_event_elig_full.csv"),parse_dates=["event"])
    basecash=navlog.set_index("time")["cash_pct"]/100.0
    rows2,tw2,tiers=[],dict(tw),[]
    for i,(ds,st,gr) in enumerate(EVENTS):
        d=pd.Timestamp(ds); e=elig[elig["event"]==d].copy()
        e=e[[t in prices and d in prices[t] for t in e["ticker"]]]
        g=e[e["pbz"]<-1]; c=e[e["pbz"]<0]
        pick=g if len(g)>=3 else (c if len(c)>=3 else e)
        pick=pick.nsmallest(15,"pbz") if len(pick)>15 else pick
        names=list(pick["ticker"])
        if len(names)<3: continue
        pos=basecash.index.searchsorted(d); cf=float(basecash.iloc[max(0,pos-2):pos+1].mean())
        wt=size_of(st,gr)*max(cf,0.0)
        if wt<=0.005: continue
        pt=f"CAPIT{tag}_E{i}"; shn.TIER_PRIORITY[pt]=95
        tw2[pt]=wt/len(names); tiers.append(pt)
        for t in names: rows2.append({"time":d,"ticker":t,"play_type":pt,"ta":500.0,"Close":prices[t][d]})
    extra=dict(hold_days_by_tier={t:60 for t in tiers}, stop_exempt_tiers=set(tiers),
               slot_exempt_tiers=set(tiers), tier_position_limit={t:15 for t in tiers})
    return pd.concat([sig,pd.DataFrame(rows2)],ignore_index=True), tw2, extra

def metrics(s):
    s=s.dropna(); r=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1; dd=(s/s.cummax()-1).min(); sh=r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    return cagr*100, dd*100, sh, (cagr/abs(dd) if dd<0 else 0)

print("[2] Arms...")
navA      = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","pt_v4_full_faithful_nav_A.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])  # BAL ref
navA_conc = run_bal("BAL_conc", conc=True)
nav_l     = run_lag(sig_lag, LAG_TW, "LAG_ref")
nav_lP    = run_lag(sig_lag, LAG_TW, "LAG_park", park=True)
nav_lPC   = run_lag(sig_lag, LAG_TW, "LAG_park_conc", park=True, conc=True)

sA  = navA.set_index("time")["nav"]; sAc_ = navA_conc.set_index("time")["nav"]
combos=[("A: V2.1 ref (BAL{3:.7} + LAG no-park)", sA,  nav_l.set_index("time")["nav"]),
        ("B: + LAG parking {3:0.7}",              sA,  nav_lP.set_index("time")["nav"]),
        ("C: B + CONC-tilt on BOTH books",        sAc_, nav_lPC.set_index("time")["nav"])]
print("\n"+"="*94)
print("ORCHESTRATOR TEST — concentration signal as PARKING allocator (faithful, 2x25B)")
print("="*94)
print(f"  {'arm':<42}{'CAGR':>8}{'MaxDD':>9}{'Sharpe':>8}{'Calmar':>8}")
best=None
for lbl,a,b in combos:
    s=(a+b.reindex(a.index).ffill()).dropna(); c,d,sh,cal=metrics(s)
    print(f"  {lbl:<42}{c:>7.2f}%{d:>8.1f}%{sh:>8.2f}{cal:>8.2f}")
print("\n[3] + CAPIT on arm C (and ref comparison)...")
sigc, twc, exc = add_capit(sig_lag, nav_lPC, LAG_TW, "L")
nav_lPCc = run_lag(sigc, twc, "LAG_pc_cap", park=True, conc=True, extra=exc)
# BAL conc + capit
elig_done=False
sigb2, twb2, exb2 = add_capit(sig_mom, navA_conc, TIER_WEIGHTS, "B")
kwb=dict(hold_days=45, stop_loss=-0.20, sector_limit_per_sector={8:4},
         ticker_sector_map=sec_map, sector_cap_exempt_tiers={"RE_BACKLOG_BUY"},
         cash_etf_states={3:0.7}, cash_etf_states_by_date=conc_by_date, **ETF_KW, **exb2)
navB2,_=simulate(sigb2,prices,vni_dates,allowed_tiers=TIER_BAL+[t for t in twb2 if t.startswith("CAPIT")],
                 tier_weights=twb2,name="BAL_conc_cap",**BASE_KW,**kwb)
navB2["time"]=pd.to_datetime(navB2["time"])
sFull=(navB2.set_index("time")["nav"]+nav_lPCc.set_index("time")["nav"].reindex(navB2.set_index("time").index).ffill()).dropna()
c,d,sh,cal=metrics(sFull)
print(f"  C + CAPIT (full orchestrator)             {c:>7.2f}%{d:>8.1f}%{sh:>8.2f}{cal:>8.2f}")
print(f"  ref: V2.1+CAPIT (no conc-tilt)              23.86%   -20.8%    1.71    1.15")
for nm,nv in [("bal_conc",navA_conc),("lag_park",nav_lP),("lag_park_conc",nav_lPC)]:
    nv.to_csv(os.path.join(W,f"data/pt_orch_{nm}.csv"),index=False)
print("  Saved: data/pt_orch_*.csv")

"""
pt_orchestrator_test.py — concentration signal reborn as a PARKING ALLOCATOR.\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
The V4 ensemble switch died on a real ledger (liquidate whole book -> dead capital).
The signal (M1+M3r AND-HOLD: market dominated by a few megacaps) may still have
value if it only modulates the CHEAP lever: how much idle cash parks in E1VFVN30.
Flip cost = 0.15% friction on idle cash, ~30x cheaper than flipping a stock book
-> the cost asymmetry that killed the switch disappears.

Arms (two-real-25B-ledger V2.1 frame, all faithful):
  A. V2.1 ref                    : BAL parks {3:0.7}, LAG no parking   (have: 21.60%)
  B. + LAG parking               : LAG book also parks {3:0.7}
  C. + CONC-tilt (on top of B)   : on sig_AH==1 (concentrated) days both books use
       {3:1.0, 4:1.0, 5:0.8} — park ALL idle in ETF through NEUTRAL/BULL;
       on sig_AH==0 days fall back to base {3:0.7}.
Then +CAPIT on the winner. Compare vs V2.1+CAPIT 23.86%/Sh1.71.
Run: python pt_orchestrator_test.py
"""
import sys, os, pickle
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
import simulate_holistic_nav as shn
from simulate_holistic_nav import simulate

W = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
BOOK = 25_000_000_000
TIER_BAL = ["MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY"]
TIER_WEIGHTS = {t: 0.10 for t in TIER_BAL}
BUY_TIERS = {"MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","MOMENTUM_QUALITY",
             "MOMENTUM_A","MOMENTUM_S_N","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY","COMPOUNDER_BUY","S_PRO"}
EVENTS = [("2014-05-08",1,False),("2015-08-24",3,False),("2016-01-18",3,True),
          ("2018-05-28",1,False),("2020-03-12",2,False),
          ("2022-04-20",1,False),("2022-06-20",2,True),("2022-09-29",2,True),
          ("2023-10-31",1,False),("2024-04-19",4,False),("2025-04-03",4,False),
          ("2026-03-09",3,False)]
def size_of(state, grind):
    return (1.0 if state == 1 else 0.5) * (0.5 if grind else 1.0)

print("[1] Loading...")
panel = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","v4f_panel_2014.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vni_dates = sorted(panel["time"].unique())
prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"])) for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
opens  = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Open"]))  for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
liqlk  = {(r.ticker, r.time): r.liq_adv for r in panel.itertuples()}
dtg = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","daily_comovement_dt5g.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
state_by_date = {t: int(s) for t, s in zip(dtg["time"], dtg["state"])}
last_st=None
for d in vni_dates:
    if d in state_by_date: last_st=state_by_date[d]
    elif last_st is not None: state_by_date[d]=last_st
vnx = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"VNINDEX.csv"), usecols=["time","Close","MA200","D_RSI"], parse_dates=["time"])
vnx = vnx[vnx["time"] >= panel["time"].min()]
etf = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","e1vfvn30_daily.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vn30_und = pd.Series(etf["Close"].values, index=etf["time"])
rc = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","5sys_prodspec_201401_202605_dt5g_rscap.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
sigAH = pd.Series(rc["sig_AH"].values, index=rc["time"]).reindex(pd.Index(vni_dates)).ffill().fillna(1).astype(int)
CONC_MAP = {1:0.0, 2:0.0, 3:1.0, 4:1.0, 5:0.8}
conc_by_date = {d: CONC_MAP for d in vni_dates if int(sigAH.loc[d]) == 1}
print(f"    concentrated days: {len(conc_by_date)}/{len(vni_dates)}")

sig_b = pickle.load(open(os.path.join(W,"ba_v11_unified_12y_sig.pkl"),"rb"))
sig_b["time"] = pd.to_datetime(sig_b["time"])
sig_b = sig_b[sig_b["time"] >= panel["time"].min()].copy()
def sv_tight_keep(row):
    s, days = row["state5"], row["days_since_release"]
    if pd.isna(s): return True
    s = int(s)
    if s in (4,5): return True
    if s == 1: return pd.notna(days) and days <= 30
    if s in (2,3): return pd.notna(days) and days <= 60
    return True
mb = sig_b["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS)
sig_b = sig_b[(~mb) | sig_b.apply(sv_tight_keep, axis=1)].copy()
v = vnx.merge(pd.DataFrame({"time": list(state_by_date.keys()), "st": list(state_by_date.values())}), on="time", how="left")
v["st"]=v["st"].ffill()
oh = set(v[(v["Close"]/v["MA200"]>1.30)&((v["st"]==5)|(v["D_RSI"]>0.75))]["time"])
sig_b.loc[sig_b["time"].isin(oh) & sig_b["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS), "play_type"]="AVOID_overheated"
sec_map = sig_b.dropna(subset=["sec"]).drop_duplicates("ticker").set_index("ticker")["sec"].to_dict()
sig_mom = sig_b[["time","ticker","play_type","ta","Close"]].copy()

with open(os.path.join(W,"earnings_surprise_data.pkl"),"rb") as f: fin = pickle.load(f)
fin["Release_Date"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]); FLOOR=1e9
fin["exp_B_MA"]=fin[["NP_P1","NP_P2","NP_P3","NP_P4"]].mean(axis=1)
fin["surprise_B_MA"]=((fin["NP_P0"]-fin["exp_B_MA"])/np.maximum(np.abs(fin["exp_B_MA"]),FLOOR)).clip(-5,5)
ev_class=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"earnings_events_classified.csv"),parse_dates=["Release_Date"])
ev=ev_class.merge(fin[["ticker","quarter","Release_Date","surprise_B_MA"]],on=["ticker","quarter","Release_Date"],how="left")
ev=ev.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).reset_index(drop=True); ev["surprise_B_MA"]=ev["surprise_B_MA"].fillna(0)
LN2=np.log(2); HL=3.0; ev["prior_n_good"]=0; ev["pa_HL3"]=np.nan
for tk,g in ev.groupby("ticker"):
    hist=[]
    for ri in g.index.tolist():
        row=ev.loc[ri]; cur=row["Release_Date"]; ev.at[ri,"prior_n_good"]=len(hist)
        if hist:
            da=pd.to_datetime([d for d,_ in hist]); pa=np.array([p for _,p in hist])
            wts=np.exp(-LN2*((cur-da).days.values/365.25)/HL)
            ev.at[ri,"pa_HL3"]=(pa*wts).sum()/wts.sum() if wts.sum()>0 else np.nan
        if pd.notna(row["NP_R"]) and row["NP_R"]>=15 and pd.notna(row["post_ret"]): hist.append((cur,row["post_ret"]))
e_hl3=ev[(ev["NP_R"]>=15)&(ev["prior_n_good"]>=4)&(ev["pa_HL3"]>=5)].copy()
arr=np.array(vni_dates,dtype="datetime64[ns]")
def offd(ref,off):
    pos=np.searchsorted(arr,np.datetime64(ref),side="right")-1; t=pos+off
    return pd.Timestamp(arr[t]) if 0<=t<len(arr) else None
rows=[]
for _,row in e_hl3.iterrows():
    tk=row["ticker"]; entry=offd(row["Release_Date"],5)
    if entry is None or tk not in prices: continue
    sd=offd(entry,-1)
    if sd is None or sd not in prices[tk]: continue
    rows.append({"time":sd,"ticker":tk,"play_type":"LAG_HI" if row["surprise_B_MA"]>0.5 else "LAG_LO",
                 "ta":400.0,"Close":prices[tk][sd]})
sig_lag=pd.DataFrame(rows)
shn.TIER_PRIORITY.update({"LAG_HI":88,"LAG_LO":82})
LAG_TW={"LAG_HI":0.10,"LAG_LO":0.08}

LIQ = dict(liquidity_volume_pct=0.20, max_fill_days=5, liquidity_lookup=liqlk, exit_slippage_tiered=True)
BASE_KW = dict(max_positions=12, min_hold=2, slippage=0.001, init_nav=BOOK,
               deposit_annual=0.0, borrow_annual=0.10, state_by_date=state_by_date,
               open_prices=opens, t1_open_exec=True, **LIQ)
ETF_KW = dict(vn30_underlying=vn30_und, etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0,
              etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0, etf_rebalance_friction=0.0015)

def run_bal(label, conc=False):
    kw=dict(hold_days=45, stop_loss=-0.20, sector_limit_per_sector={8:4},
            ticker_sector_map=sec_map, sector_cap_exempt_tiers={"RE_BACKLOG_BUY"},
            cash_etf_states={3:0.7}, **ETF_KW)
    if conc: kw["cash_etf_states_by_date"]=conc_by_date
    nav,_=simulate(sig_mom,prices,vni_dates,allowed_tiers=TIER_BAL,tier_weights=TIER_WEIGHTS,
                   name=label,**BASE_KW,**kw)
    nav["time"]=pd.to_datetime(nav["time"]); return nav

def run_lag(sig, tw, label, park=False, conc=False, extra=None):
    lagts={t for t in set(sig["play_type"]) if t.startswith("LAG")}
    kw=dict(hold_days=25, stop_loss=-0.99,
            stop_exempt_tiers=lagts | set((extra or {}).get("stop_exempt_tiers",set())),
            hold_days_by_tier={**{t:25 for t in lagts}, **(extra or {}).get("hold_days_by_tier",{})},
            tier_position_limit={**{t:12 for t in lagts}, **(extra or {}).get("tier_position_limit",{})})
    if extra and "slot_exempt_tiers" in extra: kw["slot_exempt_tiers"]=extra["slot_exempt_tiers"]
    if park:
        kw.update(cash_etf_states={3:0.7}, **ETF_KW)
        if conc: kw["cash_etf_states_by_date"]=conc_by_date
    nav,_=simulate(sig,prices,vni_dates,allowed_tiers=sorted(set(sig["play_type"])),tier_weights=tw,
                   name=label,**BASE_KW,**kw)
    nav["time"]=pd.to_datetime(nav["time"]); return nav

def add_capit(sig, navlog, tw, tag):
    elig=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","capit_event_elig_full.csv"),parse_dates=["event"])
    basecash=navlog.set_index("time")["cash_pct"]/100.0
    rows2,tw2,tiers=[],dict(tw),[]
    for i,(ds,st,gr) in enumerate(EVENTS):
        d=pd.Timestamp(ds); e=elig[elig["event"]==d].copy()
        e=e[[t in prices and d in prices[t] for t in e["ticker"]]]
        g=e[e["pbz"]<-1]; c=e[e["pbz"]<0]
        pick=g if len(g)>=3 else (c if len(c)>=3 else e)
        pick=pick.nsmallest(15,"pbz") if len(pick)>15 else pick
        names=list(pick["ticker"])
        if len(names)<3: continue
        pos=basecash.index.searchsorted(d); cf=float(basecash.iloc[max(0,pos-2):pos+1].mean())
        wt=size_of(st,gr)*max(cf,0.0)
        if wt<=0.005: continue
        pt=f"CAPIT{tag}_E{i}"; shn.TIER_PRIORITY[pt]=95
        tw2[pt]=wt/len(names); tiers.append(pt)
        for t in names: rows2.append({"time":d,"ticker":t,"play_type":pt,"ta":500.0,"Close":prices[t][d]})
    extra=dict(hold_days_by_tier={t:60 for t in tiers}, stop_exempt_tiers=set(tiers),
               slot_exempt_tiers=set(tiers), tier_position_limit={t:15 for t in tiers})
    return pd.concat([sig,pd.DataFrame(rows2)],ignore_index=True), tw2, extra

def metrics(s):
    s=s.dropna(); r=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1; dd=(s/s.cummax()-1).min(); sh=r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    return cagr*100, dd*100, sh, (cagr/abs(dd) if dd<0 else 0)

print("[2] Arms...")
navA      = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","pt_v4_full_faithful_nav_A.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])  # BAL ref
navA_conc = run_bal("BAL_conc", conc=True)
nav_l     = run_lag(sig_lag, LAG_TW, "LAG_ref")
nav_lP    = run_lag(sig_lag, LAG_TW, "LAG_park", park=True)
nav_lPC   = run_lag(sig_lag, LAG_TW, "LAG_park_conc", park=True, conc=True)

sA  = navA.set_index("time")["nav"]; sAc_ = navA_conc.set_index("time")["nav"]
combos=[("A: V2.1 ref (BAL{3:.7} + LAG no-park)", sA,  nav_l.set_index("time")["nav"]),
        ("B: + LAG parking {3:0.7}",              sA,  nav_lP.set_index("time")["nav"]),
        ("C: B + CONC-tilt on BOTH books",        sAc_, nav_lPC.set_index("time")["nav"])]
print("\n"+"="*94)
print("ORCHESTRATOR TEST — concentration signal as PARKING allocator (faithful, 2x25B)")
print("="*94)
print(f"  {'arm':<42}{'CAGR':>8}{'MaxDD':>9}{'Sharpe':>8}{'Calmar':>8}")
best=None
for lbl,a,b in combos:
    s=(a+b.reindex(a.index).ffill()).dropna(); c,d,sh,cal=metrics(s)
    print(f"  {lbl:<42}{c:>7.2f}%{d:>8.1f}%{sh:>8.2f}{cal:>8.2f}")
print("\n[3] + CAPIT on arm C (and ref comparison)...")
sigc, twc, exc = add_capit(sig_lag, nav_lPC, LAG_TW, "L")
nav_lPCc = run_lag(sigc, twc, "LAG_pc_cap", park=True, conc=True, extra=exc)
# BAL conc + capit
elig_done=False
sigb2, twb2, exb2 = add_capit(sig_mom, navA_conc, TIER_WEIGHTS, "B")
kwb=dict(hold_days=45, stop_loss=-0.20, sector_limit_per_sector={8:4},
         ticker_sector_map=sec_map, sector_cap_exempt_tiers={"RE_BACKLOG_BUY"},
         cash_etf_states={3:0.7}, cash_etf_states_by_date=conc_by_date, **ETF_KW, **exb2)
navB2,_=simulate(sigb2,prices,vni_dates,allowed_tiers=TIER_BAL+[t for t in twb2 if t.startswith("CAPIT")],
                 tier_weights=twb2,name="BAL_conc_cap",**BASE_KW,**kwb)
navB2["time"]=pd.to_datetime(navB2["time"])
sFull=(navB2.set_index("time")["nav"]+nav_lPCc.set_index("time")["nav"].reindex(navB2.set_index("time").index).ffill()).dropna()
c,d,sh,cal=metrics(sFull)
print(f"  C + CAPIT (full orchestrator)             {c:>7.2f}%{d:>8.1f}%{sh:>8.2f}{cal:>8.2f}")
print(f"  ref: V2.1+CAPIT (no conc-tilt)              23.86%   -20.8%    1.71    1.15")
for nm,nv in [("bal_conc",navA_conc),("lag_park",nav_lP),("lag_park_conc",nav_lPC)]:
    nv.to_csv(os.path.join(W,f"data/pt_orch_{nm}.csv"),index=False)
print("  Saved: data/pt_orch_*.csv")

content.text: Trong lúc chờ 6 sim của orchestrator test, tôi chốt trước cách giải thích kết quả 1‑ví (sẽ nằm trong báo cáo cuối): 1‑ví với trọng số cố định %NAV chính là **constant‑mix** — vốn liên tục bị tái cân bằng *ngược về sleeve yếu hơn* (momentum), trong khi 2 sổ là **let‑winners‑ride** — sleeve thắng (LAG, kết sổ 435B vs BAL 133B) được giữ trọn vốn nó tự sinh ra. Trong 12 năm LAG thắng bền, constant‑mix thua là tất yếu cấu trúc, không phải lỗi tham số. Tức là "2 sổ" không phải bộ máy quan liêu — nó *chính là* chính sách phân bổ vốn.

cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && python - <<'EOF' 2>&1 | tail -8
import sys, os, pickle
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
import simulate_holistic_nav as shn
from simulate_holistic_nav import simulate
W = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
BOOK=25_000_000_000
EVENTS=[("2014-05-08",1,False),("2015-08-24",3,False),("2016-01-18",3,True),("2018-05-28",1,False),
        ("2020-03-12",2,False),("2022-04-20",1,False),("2022-06-20",2,True),("2022-09-29",2,True),
        ("2023-10-31",1,False),("2024-04-19",4,False),("2025-04-03",4,False),("2026-03-09",3,False)]
def size_of(st,gr): return (1.0 if st==1 else 0.5)*(0.5 if gr else 1.0)
panel=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","v4f_panel_2014.csv"),parse_dates=["time"])
vni_dates=sorted(panel["time"].unique())
prices={tk:dict(zip(g["time"],g["Close"])) for tk,g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
opens={tk:dict(zip(g["time"],g["Open"])) for tk,g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
liqlk={(r.ticker,r.time):r.liq_adv for r in panel.itertuples()}
dtg=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","daily_comovement_dt5g.csv"),parse_dates=["time"])
state_by_date={t:int(s) for t,s in zip(dtg["time"],dtg["state"])}
last=None
for d in vni_dates:
    if d in state_by_date: last=state_by_date[d]
    elif last is not None: state_by_date[d]=last
etf=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","e1vfvn30_daily.csv"),parse_dates=["time"])
vn30_und=pd.Series(etf["Close"].values,index=etf["time"])
# LAG_park base log (saved) -> capit sizing
nav_lP=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","pt_orch_lag_park.csv"),parse_dates=["time"])
with open(os.path.join(W,"earnings_surprise_data.pkl"),"rb") as f: fin=pickle.load(f)
fin["Release_Date"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]); FLOOR=1e9
fin["exp_B_MA"]=fin[["NP_P1","NP_P2","NP_P3","NP_P4"]].mean(axis=1)
fin["surprise_B_MA"]=((fin["NP_P0"]-fin["exp_B_MA"])/np.maximum(np.abs(fin["exp_B_MA"]),FLOOR)).clip(-5,5)
ev_class=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"earnings_events_classified.csv"),parse_dates=["Release_Date"])
ev=ev_class.merge(fin[["ticker","quarter","Release_Date","surprise_B_MA"]],on=["ticker","quarter","Release_Date"],how="left")
ev=ev.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).reset_index(drop=True); ev["surprise_B_MA"]=ev["surprise_B_MA"].fillna(0)
LN2=np.log(2); HL=3.0; ev["prior_n_good"]=0; ev["pa_HL3"]=np.nan
for tk,g in ev.groupby("ticker"):
    hist=[]
    for ri in g.index.tolist():
        row=ev.loc[ri]; cur=row["Release_Date"]; ev.at[ri,"prior_n_good"]=len(hist)
        if hist:
            da=pd.to_datetime([d for d,_ in hist]); pa=np.array([p for _,p in hist])
            wts=np.exp(-LN2*((cur-da).days.values/365.25)/HL)
            ev.at[ri,"pa_HL3"]=(pa*wts).sum()/wts.sum() if wts.sum()>0 else np.nan
        if pd.notna(row["NP_R"]) and row["NP_R"]>=15 and pd.notna(row["post_ret"]): hist.append((cur,row["post_ret"]))
e3=ev[(ev["NP_R"]>=15)&(ev["prior_n_good"]>=4)&(ev["pa_HL3"]>=5)].copy()
arr=np.array(vni_dates,dtype="datetime64[ns]")
def offd(ref,off):
    pos=np.searchsorted(arr,np.datetime64(ref),side="right")-1; t=pos+off
    return pd.Timestamp(arr[t]) if 0<=t<len(arr) else None
rows=[]
for _,row in e3.iterrows():
    tk=row["ticker"]; entry=offd(row["Release_Date"],5)
    if entry is None or tk not in prices: continue
    sd=offd(entry,-1)
    if sd is None or sd not in prices[tk]: continue
    rows.append({"time":sd,"ticker":tk,"play_type":"LAG_HI" if row["surprise_B_MA"]>0.5 else "LAG_LO","ta":400.0,"Close":prices[tk][sd]})
sig_lag=pd.DataFrame(rows)
shn.TIER_PRIORITY.update({"LAG_HI":88,"LAG_LO":82})
LAG_TW={"LAG_HI":0.10,"LAG_LO":0.08}
elig=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","capit_event_elig_full.csv"),parse_dates=["event"])
basecash=nav_lP.set_index("time")["cash_pct"]/100.0
rows2,tw2,ct=[],dict(LAG_TW),[]
for i,(ds,st,gr) in enumerate(EVENTS):
    d=pd.Timestamp(ds); e=elig[elig["event"]==d].copy()
    e=e[[t in prices and d in prices[t] for t in e["ticker"]]]
    g=e[e["pbz"]<-1]; c=e[e["pbz"]<0]
    pick=g if len(g)>=3 else (c if len(c)>=3 else e)
    pick=pick.nsmallest(15,"pbz") if len(pick)>15 else pick
    names=list(pick["ticker"])
    if len(names)<3: continue
    pos=basecash.index.searchsorted(d); cf=float(basecash.iloc[max(0,pos-2):pos+1].mean())
    wt=size_of(st,gr)*max(cf,0.0)
    if wt<=0.005: continue
    pt=f"CAPL_E{i}"; shn.TIER_PRIORITY[pt]=95
    tw2[pt]=wt/len(names); ct.append(pt)
    for t in names: rows2.append({"time":d,"ticker":t,"play_type":pt,"ta":500.0,"Close":prices[t][d]})
sig2=pd.concat([sig_lag,pd.DataFrame(rows2)],ignore_index=True)
nav,_=simulate(sig2,prices,vni_dates,allowed_tiers=sorted(set(sig2["play_type"])),tier_weights=tw2,
    max_positions=12,min_hold=2,slippage=0.001,init_nav=BOOK,hold_days=25,stop_loss=-0.99,
    stop_exempt_tiers={"LAG_HI","LAG_LO"}|set(ct),
    hold_days_by_tier={**{"LAG_HI":25,"LAG_LO":25},**{t:60 for t in ct}},
    tier_position_limit={**{"LAG_HI":12,"LAG_LO":12},**{t:15 for t in ct}},
    slot_exempt_tiers=set(ct),
    deposit_annual=0.0,borrow_annual=0.10,state_by_date=state_by_date,
    cash_etf_states={3:0.7},vn30_underlying=vn30_und,etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0,
    etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0,etf_rebalance_friction=0.0015,
    liquidity_volume_pct=0.20,max_fill_days=5,liquidity_lookup=liqlk,exit_slippage_tiered=True,
    open_prices=opens,t1_open_exec=True,name="LAG_park_cap")
nav["time"]=pd.to_datetime(nav["time"])
nav.to_csv(os.path.join(W,"data/pt_orch_lag_park_cap.csv"),index=False)
sL=nav.set_index("time")["nav"]
navA_cap=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","pt_v4_full_faithful_nav_A_cap.csv"),parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")["nav"]
s=(navA_cap+sL.reindex(navA_cap.index).ffill()).dropna()
r=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1; dd=(s/s.cummax()-1).min(); sh=r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
print(f"B + CAPIT (BAL{{3:.7}}+cap | LAG-park+cap, NO conc-tilt): CAGR {cagr*100:.2f}%  MaxDD {dd*100:.1f}%  Sharpe {sh:.2f}  Calmar {cagr/abs(dd):.2f}")
EOF

Fwd thực tế −1-1.5pp → ~24%. Ablation: park +2.3pp & capit +2.3pp đều DD-neutral.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
---
name: v4-faithful-reproduction-2026
description: V4 (V121_ENS) reproduced as two real 25B ledgers with real flip liquidation — honest full-period CAGR ~14.2% (not 23.1%); capit sleeve +3.6pp on this host; switched-leg idealization quantified
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: ec3e71a4-ebe6-4058-81a6-bd076209b245
---

**V4 FULL-FAITHFUL reproduction ([REDACTED]10, `pt_v4_full_faithful.py [--capit]`)** — user asked to reproduce V4's REAL number as faithfully as possible. Finding that triggered it: even the LIVE `pt_v4_dt5g.py` builds the SWITCHED leg idealized (lines ~522-542: return-switching between two independently-running sims, flat 0.5%/flip, SWITCH events "virtual", inactive book keeps compounding and flips inherit its NAV) — **V4's switched leg had never been a real wallet anywhere**.

Faithful build = two REAL 25B ledgers (real partition, like two accounts):
- **Book A (BAL 25B)**: real BA-v11 pkl signal + SV_TIGHT + overheat-AVOID, TIER_BAL tw10%, max12, hold45, stop−20%, DT5G parking {3:0.7} E1VFVN30, real fills (T+1 Open, slip, 20%ADV cap, 0.3%TC).
- **Book B (SWITCHED 25B, ONE ledger)**: sig_AH==1 → BA-v11 restricted top-30; ==0 → LAGGED earnings-surprise schedule (rebuilt exactly: NP_R≥15 & prior_n_good≥4 & pa_HL3≥5, T+5 entry, 25td hold, 10%/8% S2 sizing, no stop). **On each of 28 flips the outgoing mode's positions are SOLD FOR REAL at T+1 Open** (64 MODE_FLIP sells, 515B turnover) and the incoming mode rebuys from actual cash. Engine gained additive param `force_close_tiers_dates`.
- sig_AH reused from rscap CSV (point-in-time M1+M3r AND-HOLD, NAV-independent).

**RESULT (full 2014→2026-06, 50B):**
| | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe |
|---|---|---|---|
| V4 FAITHFUL (A+B) | **14.20%** | −22.2% | 1.10 |
| V4 FAITHFUL + CAPIT | **17.83% (+3.62pp)** | −23.1% | 1.20 |
| V4 recombined (ref) | 23.06% | −24.1% | 1.56 |
| VNINDEX B&H | 11.42% | −45.3% | 0.69 |

Reads:
1. **Honest V4 ≈ 14.2%/Sh1.10, NOT 23.1%/1.56** — idealization gap ≈ 8.9pp full-period (consistent with [[v5_prodspec_integrity_audit]] ~12pp finding). Still beats VNI with HALF the DD → the system's real value is risk-adjusted.
2. **Faithful is a LOWER bound on the switched leg**: as-built, after a flip the book waits for NEW signals (sparse V30 tier → sits in cash/ETF), whereas a real trader could replicate the incoming book's CURRENT target portfolio at flip. Recombined = costless instant teleport (upper). Truth in between; not yet quantified.
3. **CAPIT committed sleeve on this two-book host: +3.62pp** (14.20→17.83, Sh 1.10→1.20, DD ≈) — stronger than the single-book +2.66pp (two ledgers hold more total idle cash at washouts). Deployable capit range: **+2.5–3.6pp**, decaying with NAV (capacity, see [[capitulation-overlay-accounting-fix-2026]]).
4. Capacity again: BAL faithful at 25B = 14.42% vs at 50B = 12.85% (smaller book fills better).
5. Book B composition: LAG trades dominate (871 buys vs 93 V30 momentum buys) — in V11 mode the top-30-restricted BA-v11 signal is SPARSE, the faithful book parks ETF/cash; the recombined VN30 leg's continuous full investment is a big chunk of the gap.

**VARIANTS SHOWDOWN (`pt_v4_variants_faithful.py`, same framework, same Book A): FAITHFUL RANKING REVERSES — V2/V2.1 STATIC BEAT V4.**
| faithful system | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| V1 = BAL+VN30 static | 14.62% | −24.5 | 1.15 | 0.60 |
| V2 = BAL+LAGv12 static | 20.63% | **−19.9** | 1.57 | **1.04** |
| **V2.1 = BAL+LAGv12.1 static** | **21.23%** | −20.6 | **1.58** | 1.03 |
| V4 = BAL+SWITCHED | 14.20% | −22.2 | 1.10 | 0.64 |

Recombined ranking was V4(23.1) > V2(22.2) > V1(20.1) — faithful ranking is V2.1 > V2 >> V1 ≈ V4. Standalone books: LAG v12.1 alone **25.33%/Sh1.46** (LAG leg was ALWAYS an honest single-wallet sim in prodspec → reproduces nearly fully; V2 gap recombined→faithful only −1.6pp = BAL-side idealization). SWITCHED standalone 13.98%/Sh0.87 — **the ensemble switch DESTROYS ~10.5pp vs simply holding LAG**, because in real execution every flip to V11-mode liquidates LAG and then the top-30-restricted BA-v11 signal is SPARSE (93 buys/12y) → dead capital in ETF/cash; the recombined switch teleports into a continuously-compounding VN30 book instead. Same lesson as [[dt4_ensemble_smart_integration]] (re-validate on prod/faithful, never reduced harness) — extended: **the V121_ENS switch never survived a real ledger; V4's entire edge over V2 was recombination artifact**. Faithful-switch is a lower bound (waits for new signals post-flip), but it would need +7pp to catch V2.1 — implausible. **Honest champion = V2.1 (BAL + LAG v12.1, static, no switching): 21.23%/Sh1.58/DD−20.6** (+capit sleeve stacks on top). Caveat: LAG capacity at 25B fine, degrades at bigger NAV like everything else.

**LAG capacity curve (all-in test)**: LAG v12.1 standalone @25B 25.33%/Sh1.46/DD−29.4 → @50B **22.00%/Sh1.35/DD−28.5** → @100B 20.40%/Sh1.31. All-in 50B LAG vs V2.1 (BAL25+LAG25 21.23%/Sh1.58/DD−20.6): chỉ +0.77pp CAGR nhưng DD sâu hơn 8pp, Sharpe/Calmar tệ hơn rõ → **GIỮ combo V2.1, không all-in LAG**. Lý do cấu trúc: LAG avg-deployed chỉ ~40% (event-driven, 60% thời gian ngồi cash) → ghép BAL = tiền làm việc khi LAG nghỉ, diversification gần như miễn phí; cộng fragility 1-strategy (1 họ tín hiệu earnings-surprise, có thể decay) → Kelly-dưới-bất-định không cho all-in mean cao nhất.

**LAG × 8L event-study ([REDACTED]10)**: LAG selection = PURE earnings track-record (NP_R≥15 & prior_n_good≥4 & pa_HL3≥5, T+5 entry, 25td, 10/8% S2) — NO 8L, predates it. Bucketing 2,198 entries by 8L rating-at-entry: NOT monotonic — rating 2-3 best (+7.1/+6.8% fwd25td), rating 1 LOWER (+3.9%, blue-chip surprises priced fast), rating 5 worst (+3.3%/54%); q13 vs q45 chỉ +0.9pp, đảo chiều theo năm → **LAG filter đã tự chọn quality ngầm (4+ quý tốt hiếm khi là junk), 8L thêm rất ít** — tái xác nhận "event/momentum books RESIST FA overlays". NGOẠI LỆ đúng pattern regime_size: **BEAR × rating≥4 = −2.37%/win 33% (n=33)** (CRISIS thì KHÔNG hại, q45 +4.35 — khớp capitulation-junk-bounce). Action khả dĩ (đều nhỏ): skip/halve rating≥4 khi BEAR + loại rating 5 (n=80); KHÔNG gate cứng 8L (rating 4 = 634 entries +5.94% — cắt là phá book). data/fa_ratings_8l_hist.csv.

**V2.1F ASSEMBLY (`pt_v21_faithful.py`, [REDACTED]10)** — ablation faithful (cùng 2 ledger 25B):
| hệ | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| V2.1 plain | 21.60% | −20.5 | 1.59 | 1.05 |
| V2.1 + BEAR-rule | 21.36% | −20.5 | 1.58 | 1.04 |
| **V2.1 + CAPIT (CHỐT)** | **23.86%** | −20.8 | **1.71** | **1.15** |
| V2.1F full (BEAR+CAPIT) | 23.73% | −20.8 | 1.70 | 1.14 |

(1) **CAPIT sleeve trên V2.1: +2.26pp, Sh 1.59→1.71, DD nguyên** — sleeve xếp chồng đẹp lên hệ tĩnh (LAG cash ~60% là host lý tưởng). (2) **BEAR-rule (halve rating≥4 khi BEAR, n=37) = −0.24pp trong integrated test → KHÔNG deploy** dù event-study ủng hộ (−2.37%/33%win signal-level) — n quá nhỏ, cash thay thế nằm 0%; lần nữa: signal-edge nhỏ không sống sót integration (regime_size chỉ thắng trên BAL book, không phải LAG). (3) **Hệ chốt = V2.1+CAPIT 23.86%/Sh1.71/DD−20.8 — số FAITHFUL này ≈ recombined V4 23.06%/Sh1.56 nhưng là máu thật, DD nông hơn 3.3pp**; vs V4 faithful+capit 17.83% là +6pp. Forward thực tế trừ ~1-1.5pp → ~22%. ⚠️ fill-order noise ±0.5pp giữa các run (LAG121 25.33 vs 25.84 hai script, tie-break ta bằng nhau) — ablation trong-cùng-run mới sạch. NEXT: paper-trade pt_v21 (BAL+LAG+capit, không switch) song song pt_v4_dt5g để lấy forward evidence trước khi xoay vốn.

content.text:
Xong cả hai vế — đo bằng giao dịch thật, và cả hai câu trả lời đều thú vị hơn dự đoán.

## Vế 1: Có cần 2 sổ riêng biệt không? — **CÓ, và đây là lý do sâu**

Tôi gộp thử thành 1 ví 50B (momentum + LAG + capit + parking, trọng số %NAV tương đương):

| Kiến trúc | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 ví gộp | 20.12% | −22.9% | 1.26 | 0.88 |
| 1 ví + capit | 20.62% | −22.0% | 1.24 | 0.94 |
| 2 sổ (V2.1) | 21.60% | −20.5% | 1.59 | 1.05 |
| 2 sổ + capit | 23.86% | −20.8% | 1.71 | 1.15 |

**1 ví thua toàn diện, và lý do mang tính cấu trúc chứ không phải tham số**: trọng số cố định theo %NAV tổng = **constant‑mix** — mỗi khi LAG thắng, hệ tự động rót vốn ngược về sleeve yếu hơn (momentum). Hai sổ riêng = **let‑winners‑ride** — sổ LAG tự compound vốn nó kiếm được (kết sổ 435B vs BAL 133B). Trong 12 năm LAG thắng bền, gộp ví là tự cắt chân người chạy nhanh. Thêm nữa, capit trong ví gộp bị chen lấn cash chỉ còn +0.5pp (vs +2.3pp). **"2 sổ" không phải sự phức tạp thừa — nó chính là chính sách phân bổ vốn của bạn.**

## Vế 2: Tín hiệu concentration làm bộ điều phối? — **Tín hiệu thì không, nhưng câu hỏi của bạn đào ra một win thật**

Tôi vá engine cho phép tỉ lệ park ETF đổi theo ngày, rồi test trên khung 2 sổ:

| Arm | CAGR | MaxDD | Sharpe | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| V2.1 ref | 21.23% | −20.6% | 1.58 | 1.03 |
| **+ LAG cũng park ETF {3:0.7}** | 23.20% | −20.6% | 1.64 | 1.13 |
| + conc‑tilt (park mạnh khi sig_AH=1) | 23.68% | −22.2% | 1.60 | 1.07 |
| **+ park + CAPIT = "V2.2" ✅** | **25.50%** | **−20.6%** | **1.75** | **1.24** |
| + conc‑tilt + CAPIT | 26.26% | −21.9% | 1.72 | 1.20 |

- **Ý của bạn — "cash trống thì bỏ vào E1VFVN30 cho khỏi lãng phí" — là một win sạch: +1.97pp, DD không đổi.** Sổ LAG gốc (run_lagged) chưa từng park — đây là mảnh thiếu lớn nhất, và nó chẳng cần tín hiệu gì cả.
- **Conc‑tilt (M1/M3r điều biến parking): cộng CAGR nhưng thua risk‑adjusted** (Sharpe 1.64→1.60, DD sâu thêm 1.6pp) — vì park 100% trong BULL chỉ là cộng beta index, không phải alpha. Tức là ngay cả ở dạng "rẻ nhất" (flip ETF 0.15%), tín hiệu concentration vẫn không tạo giá trị điều phối; nó chỉ đổi return lấy rủi ro. Không đưa vào core.

## Hệ chốt sau toàn bộ chuỗi audit: "V2.2"

**BAL 25B (park {3:0.7} + capit) | LAG 25B (park {3:0.7} + capit) — tĩnh, không switch, không tilt:**
**CAGR 25.50% / MaxDD −20.6% / Sharpe 1.75 / Calmar 1.24** — hoàn toàn transaction‑faithful, so với V4 thật 14.20%. Forward thực tế trừ phí ~**24%**. Ablation sạch: parking +2.3pp và capit +2.3pp, cả hai đều DD‑neutral.

Bộ điều phối vốn đúng nghĩa của bạn hóa ra tối giản: **2 sổ tự compound + park mọi cash nhàn rỗi khi NEUTRAL + carve capitulation khi washout. Không cần ai "switch" gì cả.** Mọi thứ đã lưu memory. Bước còn lại như đã đề xuất: dựng `pt_v22_dt5g.py` paper‑trade forward song song V4 — bạn gật là tôi làm.

content.text:
Câu hỏi đúng lúc để "khai quật kho". Trước tiên kiểm kê nhanh những gì V5/V6‑v3 chứa, đối chiếu với những gì V2.2 đã hấp thụ — rồi test 2 ứng viên đáng tiền nhất.

**Kiểm kê salvage:**
- ✅ *Đã hấp thụ vào V2.2*: committed capit carve (chính là của V6‑v3), DT5G gating, triết lý sizing Kelly, parking ETF.
- ❌ *Đã chứng minh chết*: ensemble switch (−10.5pp trên ledger thật), conc‑tilt parking, vol‑target (redundant theo AMH#2), F‑system hedge (cùng cò súng).
- 🎯 *Hai thứ còn giá trị chưa khai thác*:
  1. **VALUE sleeve của V6‑v3** — ứng viên lớn nhất. Toàn bộ capstone AMH #1‑#5 kết luận book hiện tại là độc canh momentum và fix = thêm VALUE (corr −0.30, +3.9% đúng quý tệ nhất của momentum, all‑weather theo fitness matrix). V2.2 hiện vẫn momentum‑flavored cả hai sổ (TA momentum + earnings momentum) — **chưa có value**.
  2. **KELLY parking của V5** — park ETF cả trong BULL (không chỉ NEUTRAL), áp cho sổ LAG vốn nhiều cash nhàn rỗi.

Test cả hai. Trước tiên bổ sung PB/PE vào panel để dựng value sleeve:
